<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>NCA Performance Appraisal Progress Dashboard</title>
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.4.0/css/all.min.css">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;600;700;800&family=Space+Grotesk:wght@600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <!-- Add jsPDF and html2canvas libraries -->
    <script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jspdf/2.5.1/jspdf.umd.min.js"></script>
    <script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/html2canvas/1.4.1/html2canvas.min.js"></script>
    <!-- Add Firebase SDKs -->
    <script src="https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/9.22.0/firebase-app-compat.js"></script>
    <script src="https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/9.22.0/firebase-auth-compat.js"></script>
    <script src="https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/9.22.0/firebase-firestore-compat.js"></script>
    <style>
        /* Add login system styles */
        .auth-container {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            min-height: 100vh;
            width: 100%;
            background:
                radial-gradient(circle at 12% 14%, rgba(231, 76, 60, 0.22), transparent 22%),
                radial-gradient(circle at 88% 82%, rgba(46, 204, 113, 0.18), transparent 24%),
                radial-gradient(circle at 70% 18%, rgba(241, 196, 15, 0.10), transparent 18%),
                linear-gradient(135deg, #081120 0%, #0f172a 34%, #102a43 64%, #163b65 100%);
            padding: 20px;
            position: relative;
            overflow: hidden;
            isolation: isolate;
        }

        .auth-container::before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            inset: 0;
            background:
                linear-gradient(120deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.06) 0%, rgba(255,255,255,0) 38%),
                repeating-linear-gradient(
                    90deg,
                    rgba(255,255,255,0.035) 0,
                    rgba(255,255,255,0.035) 1px,
                    transparent 1px,
                    transparent 88px
                ),
                repeating-linear-gradient(
                    0deg,
                    rgba(255,255,255,0.025) 0,
                    rgba(255,255,255,0.025) 1px,
                    transparent 1px,
                    transparent 88px
                );
            mask-image: radial-gradient(circle at center, black 35%, transparent 100%);
            pointer-events: none;
        }

        .auth-container::after {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            width: 520px;
            height: 420px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            top: -140px;
            right: -120px;
            background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(52, 152, 219, 0.22) 0%, rgba(52, 152, 219, 0) 70%);
            pointer-events: none;
        }

        .auth-box {
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.96);
            border-radius: 24px;
            padding: 40px;
            width: 100%;
            max-width: 450px;
            box-shadow: 0 24px 60px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.28);
            border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.65);
            backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
            position: relative;
            z-index: 1;
        }

        .auth-header {
            text-align: center;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }

        .auth-header h1 {
            color: #0f172a;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
            font-family: 'Space Grotesk', 'Inter', 'Segoe UI', Tahoma, Geneva, Verdana, sans-serif;
            font-size: 2rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            line-height: 1.1;
            letter-spacing: -0.03em;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 8px;
        }

        .auth-header h1 i {
            font-size: 1.15rem;
            color: #3498db;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(52,152,219,0.14), rgba(231,76,60,0.14));
            padding: 12px;
            border-radius: 999px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 20px rgba(52, 152, 219, 0.14);
        }

        .auth-header .dashboard-title {
            display: inline-block;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0f172a 0%, #1d4ed8 55%, #e74c3c 100%);
            -webkit-background-clip: text;
            -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
            background-clip: text;
            text-wrap: balance;
        }

        .auth-header p {
            color: #64748b;
            font-family: 'Inter', 'Segoe UI', Tahoma, Geneva, Verdana, sans-serif;
            font-size: 0.98rem;
            font-weight: 500;
        }

        .nca-logo-auth {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }

        .nca-logo-auth img {
            width: 260px;
            max-width: 100%;
            height: auto;
            display: block;
        }

        .nca-logo {
            font-family: Arial, sans-serif;
            text-align: center;
            color: #2c3e50;
            font-weight: bold;
            line-height: 1.2;
        }

        .nca-logo .top-line {
            font-size: 1.4rem;
            letter-spacing: 2px;
            margin-bottom: 5px;
        }

        .nca-logo .middle-line {
            font-size: 3rem;
            font-weight: 900;
            letter-spacing: 4px;
            color: #e74c3c;
        }

        .nca-logo .bottom-line {
            font-size: 1.1rem;
            letter-spacing: 1px;
        }

        .auth-tabs {
            display: flex;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            border-bottom: 2px solid #ecf0f1;
        }

        .auth-tab {
            flex: 1;
            padding: 15px;
            text-align: center;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-weight: 600;
            color: #7f8c8d;
            transition: all 0.3s;
        }

        .auth-tab.active {
            color: #3498db;
            border-bottom: 3px solid #3498db;
        }

        .auth-form {
            display: none;
        }

        .auth-form.active {
            display: block;
        }

        .form-group {
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }

        .form-group label {
            display: block;
            margin-bottom: 8px;
            font-weight: 600;
            color: #2c3e50;
        }

        .form-group input, .form-group select {
            width: 100%;
            padding: 12px;
            border: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
            border-radius: 6px;
            font-size: 1rem;
            transition: border-color 0.3s;
        }

        .form-group input:focus, .form-group select:focus {
            outline: none;
            border-color: #3498db;
        }

        .auth-btn {
            width: 100%;
            padding: 12px;
            background-color: #3498db;
            color: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 6px;
            font-size: 1rem;
            font-weight: 600;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: background-color 0.3s;
        }

        .auth-btn:hover {
            background-color: #2980b9;
        }

        .auth-btn.secondary {
            background-color: #7f8c8d;
        }

        .auth-btn.secondary:hover {
            background-color: #6c7a7d;
        }

        .auth-error {
            background-color: #ffebee;
            color: #c0392b;
            padding: 10px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            display: none;
        }

        .auth-success {
            background-color: #d5f4e6;
            color: #27ae60;
            padding: 10px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            display: none;
        }

        .auth-links {
            text-align: center;
            margin-top: 20px;
            font-size: 0.9rem;
            color: #7f8c8d;
        }

        .auth-links a {
            color: #3498db;
            text-decoration: none;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-weight: 600;
        }

        .auth-links a:hover {
            text-decoration: underline;
        }

        .user-info {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 10px;
            background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
            padding: 10px 15px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            color: white;
            position: relative;
        }

        .user-avatar {
            width: 35px;
            height: 35px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            background-color: #3498db;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            color: white;
            font-weight: 600;
            font-size: 0.9rem;
        }

        .user-menu {
            position: relative;
        }

        .user-menu-btn {
            background: none;
            border: none;
            color: white;
            cursor: pointer;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 5px;
            padding: 5px;
            border-radius: 4px;
            transition: background-color 0.3s;
        }

        .user-menu-btn:hover {
            background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
        }

        .user-dropdown {
            position: absolute;
            top: 100%;
            right: 0;
            background-color: white;
            border-radius: 8px;
            box-shadow: 0 5px 20px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15);
            min-width: 180px;
            display: none;
            z-index: 1000;
            margin-top: 8px;
            overflow: hidden;
            border: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
        }

        .user-dropdown.show {
            display: block;
            animation: fadeIn 0.2s ease;
        }

        @keyframes fadeIn {
            from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(-10px); }
            to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
        }

        .user-dropdown-item {
            padding: 12px 15px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 10px;
            color: #333;
            text-decoration: none;
            transition: background-color 0.2s;
            border-bottom: 1px solid #f0f0f0;
            font-size: 0.9rem;
        }

        .user-dropdown-item:last-child {
            border-bottom: none;
        }

        .user-dropdown-item:hover {
            background-color: #f5f7fa;
        }

        .user-dropdown-item.logout {
            color: #e74c3c;
        }

        .user-dropdown-item.logout:hover {
            background-color: #ffebee;
        }

        /* Hide dashboard by default */
        .dashboard-container {
            display: none;
        }

        /* Keep all existing styles below */
        :root {
            --primary-color: #2c3e50;
            --secondary-color: #3498db;
            --success-color: #27ae60;
            --warning-color: #f39c12;
            --danger-color: #e74c3c;
            --light-bg: #f8f9fa;
            --border-color: #e0e0e0;
            --text-color: #333;
            --light-text: #7f8c8d;
        }
        
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
            font-family: 'Segoe UI', Tahoma, Geneva, Verdana, sans-serif;
        }
        
        body {
            background:
                radial-gradient(circle at top left, rgba(231, 76, 60, 0.16), transparent 24%),
                radial-gradient(circle at bottom right, rgba(39, 174, 96, 0.14), transparent 26%),
                linear-gradient(135deg, #081120 0%, #0f172a 38%, #163b65 100%);
            background-attachment: fixed;
            color: var(--text-color);
            line-height: 1.6;
        }
        
        .container {
            max-width: 1400px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            padding: 20px;
        }
        
        header {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--primary-color), #1a2530);
            color: white;
            padding: 25px;
            border-radius: 10px;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
            box-shadow: 0 5px 15px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: flex-start;
        }
        
        .header-left {
            flex: 1;
        }
        
        .nca-logo-header {
            margin-bottom: 15px;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: flex-start;
            align-items: flex-start;
            padding-left: 0;
            padding-top: 10px;
            position: relative;
            left: 0;
        }

        .nca-logo-header img {
            width: 260px;
            max-width: 100%;
            height: auto;
            display: block;
            margin-left: 0;
            margin-right: auto;
        }

        .nca-logo-header .top-line {
            font-size: 1.4rem;
            letter-spacing: 2px;
            margin-bottom: 3px;
        }

        .nca-logo-header .middle-line {
            font-size: 3.2rem;
            font-weight: 900;
            letter-spacing: 4px;
            color: #e74c3c;
        }

        .nca-logo-header .bottom-line {
            font-size: 1.2rem;
            letter-spacing: 1px;
        }
        
        h1 {
            font-size: 2rem;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 15px;
        }
        
        h1 i {
            color: var(--secondary-color);
        }
        
        .subtitle {
            font-size: 1.1rem;
            color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8);
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        
        .date-info {
            background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
            padding: 15px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 10px;
            font-weight: 600;
            margin-top: 10px;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
        }
        
        .date-info-text {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 8px;
        }
        
        .date-info-text span {
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.3s;
            padding: 4px 8px;
            border-radius: 4px;
        }
        
        .date-info-text span:hover {
            background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2);
        }
        
        .date-range-inputs {
            display: none;
            gap: 10px;
            align-items: center;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
        }
        
        .date-range-inputs input {
            padding: 8px 12px;
            border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3);
            border-radius: 4px;
            background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
            color: white;
            font-weight: 600;
            min-width: 140px;
        }
        
        .date-range-inputs input:focus {
            outline: none;
            border-color: var(--secondary-color);
        }
        
        .date-range-inputs button {
            padding: 8px 15px;
            background-color: var(--secondary-color);
            color: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 4px;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-weight: 600;
            transition: background-color 0.3s;
        }
        
        .date-range-inputs button:hover {
            background-color: #2980b9;
        }
        
        .date-range-inputs .cancel-btn {
            background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2);
        }
        
        .date-range-inputs .cancel-btn:hover {
            background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3);
        }
        
        .calendar-modal {
            position: absolute;
            background-color: white;
            border-radius: 8px;
            box-shadow: 0 5px 20px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
            padding: 20px;
            z-index: 1000;
            color: var(--text-color);
            margin-top: 10px;
            min-width: 300px;
        }
        
        .calendar-header {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            margin-bottom: 15px;
        }
        
        .calendar-nav {
            display: flex;
            gap: 10px;
        }
        
        .calendar-nav button {
            background: none;
            border: none;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-size: 1.2rem;
            color: var(--primary-color);
            padding: 5px;
            border-radius: 4px;
        }
        
        .calendar-nav button:hover {
            background-color: #f0f0f0;
        }
        
        .calendar-month-year {
            font-weight: 600;
            font-size: 1.1rem;
        }
        
        .calendar-weekdays {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(7, 1fr);
            text-align: center;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
            font-weight: 600;
            color: var(--light-text);
        }
        
        .calendar-days {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(7, 1fr);
            gap: 5px;
        }
        
        .calendar-day {
            padding: 10px;
            text-align: center;
            border-radius: 4px;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.2s;
        }
        
        .calendar-day:hover {
            background-color: #f0f0f0;
        }
        
        .calendar-day.selected {
            background-color: var(--secondary-color);
            color: white;
        }
        
        .calendar-day.other-month {
            color: #ccc;
        }
        
        .calendar-day.today {
            background-color: var(--warning-color);
            color: white;
        }
        
        .calendar-footer {
            margin-top: 15px;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
        }
        
        .dashboard-stats {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(200px, 1fr));
            gap: 20px;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }
        
        .stat-card {
            background-color: white;
            border-radius: 8px;
            padding: 20px;
            box-shadow: 0 3px 10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 15px;
            transition: transform 0.3s ease;
        }
        
        .stat-card:hover {
            transform: translateY(-5px);
        }
        
        .stat-icon {
            width: 60px;
            height: 60px;
            border-radius: 10px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            font-size: 1.8rem;
            color: white;
        }
        
        .stat-1 { background-color: var(--secondary-color); }
        .stat-2 { background-color: var(--success-color); }
        .stat-3 { background-color: var(--warning-color); }
        .stat-4 { background-color: #9b59b6; }
        
        .stat-info h3 {
            font-size: 2rem;
            margin-bottom: 5px;
        }
        
        .stat-info p {
            color: var(--light-text);
            font-weight: 600;
        }
        
        .controls {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            margin-bottom: 25px;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            gap: 15px;
        }
        
        .filter-controls, .view-controls {
            display: flex;
            gap: 15px;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
        }
        
        .filter-btn, .view-btn, .action-btn {
            padding: 10px 20px;
            background-color: white;
            border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
            border-radius: 6px;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-weight: 600;
            transition: all 0.3s;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 8px;
        }
        
        .filter-btn:hover, .view-btn:hover, .action-btn:hover {
            background-color: #f0f0f0;
        }
        
        .filter-btn.active, .action-btn.active {
            background-color: var(--secondary-color);
            color: white;
            border-color: var(--secondary-color);
        }
        
        .view-btn.active {
            background-color: var(--primary-color);
            color: white;
            border-color: var(--primary-color);
        }
        
        .action-btn.save-btn {
            background-color: var(--success-color);
            color: white;
            border-color: var(--success-color);
        }
        
        .action-btn.save-btn:hover {
            background-color: #219653;
        }
        
        .action-btn.reset-btn {
            background-color: var(--danger-color);
            color: white;
            border-color: var(--danger-color);
        }
        
        .action-btn.reset-btn:hover {
            background-color: #c0392b;
        }
        
        .action-btn.pdf-btn {
            background-color: #9b59b6;
            color: white;
            border-color: #9b59b6;
        }
        
        .action-btn.pdf-btn:hover {
            background-color: #8e44ad;
        }
        
        .action-btn.reminders-btn {
            background-color: #e67e22;
            color: white;
            border-color: #e67e22;
        }
        
        .action-btn.reminders-btn:hover {
            background-color: #d35400;
        }
        
        .objectives-container {
            display: grid;
            gap: 25px;
            margin-bottom: 40px;
        }
        
        /* Grid view styling */
        .objectives-container.grid-view {
            grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(600px, 1fr));
        }
        
        /* List view styling */
        .objectives-container.list-view {
            grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        }
        
        .list-view .objective-card {
            max-width: 100%;
        }
        
        @media (max-width: 768px) {
            .objectives-container.grid-view {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            }
        }
        
        .objective-card {
            background-color: white;
            border-radius: 10px;
            overflow: hidden;
            box-shadow: 0 5px 15px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);
            transition: all 0.3s;
        }
        
        .objective-card:hover {
            box-shadow: 0 8px 25px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12);
        }
        
        .card-header {
            padding: 20px;
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color);
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            background-color: #f8fafc;
        }
        
        .objective-title {
            font-weight: 700;
            font-size: 1.2rem;
            color: var(--primary-color);
            flex: 1;
            margin-right: 15px;
        }
        
        .objective-title-input {
            flex: 1;
            padding: 10px;
            border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
            border-radius: 6px;
            font-size: 1.1rem;
            font-weight: 600;
            color: var(--primary-color);
            display: none;
        }
        
        .status-badge {
            padding: 5px 12px;
            border-radius: 20px;
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            font-weight: 600;
            white-space: nowrap;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        
        .status-select {
            padding: 5px 12px;
            border-radius: 20px;
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            font-weight: 600;
            border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
            background-color: white;
            color: var(--primary-color);
            cursor: pointer;
            display: none;
        }
        
        .status-not-started { background-color: #ecf0f1; color: #7f8c8d; }
        .status-in-progress { background-color: #ffeaa7; color: #d35400; }
        .status-completed { background-color: #d5f4e6; color: var(--success-color); }
        
        .card-content {
            padding: 20px;
        }
        
        .progress-section {
            margin-bottom: 25px;
        }
        
        .progress-header {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            margin-bottom: 8px;
        }
        
        .progress-label {
            font-weight: 600;
            color: var(--primary-color);
        }
        
        .progress-value {
            font-weight: 700;
            color: var(--secondary-color);
        }
        
        .progress-bar {
            height: 10px;
            background-color: #ecf0f1;
            border-radius: 5px;
            overflow: hidden;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
        }
        
        .progress-fill {
            height: 100%;
            border-radius: 5px;
            transition: width 0.5s ease;
        }
        
        .progress-input-container {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 10px;
            margin-top: 15px;
        }
        
        .progress-slider {
            flex-grow: 1;
            height: 10px;
            -webkit-appearance: none;
            appearance: none;
            background: #ddd;
            border-radius: 5px;
            outline: none;
        }
        
        .progress-slider::-webkit-slider-thumb {
            -webkit-appearance: none;
            appearance: none;
            width: 20px;
            height: 20px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            background: var(--secondary-color);
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        
        .progress-number {
            width: 60px;
            padding: 5px 10px;
            border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
            border-radius: 4px;
            text-align: center;
            font-weight: 600;
        }
        
        .action-kpi-container {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
            gap: 20px;
        }
        
        @media (max-width: 1200px) {
            .action-kpi-container {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            }
        }
        
        .action-points, .kpis {
            margin-top: 10px;
        }
        
        .section-title {
            font-size: 1.1rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: var(--primary-color);
            margin-bottom: 15px;
            padding-bottom: 8px;
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: space-between;
        }
        
        .add-task-btn {
            background-color: var(--secondary-color);
            color: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 4px;
            padding: 5px 10px;
            font-size: 0.9rem;
            cursor: pointer;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 5px;
            transition: background-color 0.3s;
        }
        
        .add-task-btn:hover {
            background-color: #2980b9;
        }
        
        .task-list {
            list-style-type: none;
        }
        
        .task-item {
            padding: 12px 0;
            border-bottom: 1px dashed var(--border-color);
        }
        
        .task-item:last-child {
            border-bottom: none;
        }
        
        .task-content {
            display: flex;
            align-items: flex-start;
            justify-content: space-between;
            margin-bottom: 8px;
        }
        
        .task-text-container {
            flex-grow: 1;
            padding-right: 15px;
            min-height: 30px;
        }
        
        .task-text {
            min-height: 30px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            word-break: break-word;
        }
        
        .task-text-input {
            width: 100%;
            padding: 5px 10px;
            border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
            border-radius: 4px;
            font-size: 0.95rem;
            display: none;
        }
        
        .task-actions {
            display: flex;
            gap: 8px;
        }
        
        .task-action-btn {
            background: none;
            border: none;
            cursor: pointer;
            color: var(--light-text);
            font-size: 0.9rem;
            padding: 2px 5px;
            border-radius: 3px;
            transition: all 0.2s;
        }
        
        .task-action-btn:hover {
            background-color: #f0f0f0;
            color: var(--primary-color);
        }
        
        .task-checkbox {
            width: 22px;
            height: 22px;
            cursor: pointer;
            accent-color: var(--success-color);
        }
        
        .task-notes-section {
            margin-top: 10px;
            display: none;
        }
        
        .task-attachments-section {
            margin-top: 10px;
            display: none;
        }
        
        .task-section-label {
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            font-weight: 600;
            color: var(--light-text);
            margin-bottom: 5px;
            display: block;
        }
        
        .notes-container, .attachments-container {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 10px;
        }
        
        .note-item, .attachment-item {
            background-color: #f8f9fa;
            border-radius: 6px;
            padding: 10px;
            border-left: 3px solid var(--secondary-color);
        }
        
        .attachment-item {
            border-left-color: #9b59b6;
        }
        
        .note-header, .attachment-header {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            margin-bottom: 5px;
        }
        
        .note-date, .attachment-name {
            font-size: 0.8rem;
            font-weight: 600;
            color: var(--secondary-color);
        }
        
        .attachment-name {
            color: #9b59b6;
        }
        
        .delete-note-btn, .edit-note-btn, .delete-attachment-btn {
            background: none;
            border: none;
            color: var(--danger-color);
            cursor: pointer;
            font-size: 0.8rem;
            padding: 2px 5px;
        }
        
        .edit-note-btn {
            color: var(--secondary-color);
            margin-right: 6px;
        }

        .note-text, .attachment-info {
            font-size: 0.9rem;
            color: var(--text-color);
        }
        
        .attachment-info {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
        }
        
        .attachment-size {
            font-size: 0.8rem;
            color: var(--light-text);
        }
        
        .view-attachment-btn {
            background-color: var(--secondary-color);
            color: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 4px;
            padding: 4px 8px;
            font-size: 0.8rem;
            cursor: pointer;
            text-decoration: none;
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 5px;
        }
        
        .view-attachment-btn:hover {
            background-color: #2980b9;
        }
        
        .add-note-form, .add-attachment-form {
            background-color: white;
            border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
            border-radius: 6px;
            padding: 10px;
            margin-top: 10px;
        }
        
        .note-form-row, .attachment-form-row {
            display: flex;
            gap: 10px;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
        }
        
        .note-date-input, .attachment-file-input {
            flex: 1;
            padding: 6px 10px;
            border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
            border-radius: 4px;
            font-size: 0.9rem;
        }
        
        .attachment-file-input {
            padding: 5px;
        }
        
        .note-text-input {
            width: 100%;
            padding: 6px 10px;
            border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
            border-radius: 4px;
            font-size: 0.9rem;
            min-height: 60px;
            resize: vertical;
        }
        
        .note-form-buttons, .attachment-form-buttons {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: flex-end;
            gap: 10px;
            margin-top: 10px;
        }
        
        .note-form-btn, .attachment-form-btn {
            padding: 6px 12px;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 4px;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            font-weight: 600;
        }
        
        .note-form-btn.save, .attachment-form-btn.save {
            background-color: var(--success-color);
            color: white;
        }
        
        .note-form-btn.cancel, .attachment-form-btn.cancel {
            background-color: #ecf0f1;
            color: var(--text-color);
        }
        
        .completed {
            text-decoration: line-through;
            color: var(--light-text);
        }
        
        .footer {
            text-align: center;
            padding: 30px 0;
            color: var(--light-text);
            font-size: 0.9rem;
            border-top: 1px solid var(--border-color);
            margin-top: 20px;
        }
        
        .empty-state {
            text-align: center;
            padding: 60px 20px;
            color: var(--light-text);
        }
        
        .empty-state i {
            font-size: 4rem;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            color: #bdc3c7;
        }
        
        .empty-state h3 {
            font-size: 1.5rem;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
        }
        
        .notification {
            position: fixed;
            bottom: 20px;
            right: 20px;
            background-color: var(--success-color);
            color: white;
            padding: 15px 25px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            box-shadow: 0 5px 15px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 10px;
            z-index: 1000;
            opacity: 0;
            transform: translateY(20px);
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
        }
        
        .notification.show {
            opacity: 1;
            transform: translateY(0);
        }
        
        .reminder-notification {
            position: fixed;
            top: 20px;
            right: 20px;
            background-color: var(--warning-color);
            color: #000;
            padding: 15px 25px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            box-shadow: 0 5px 15px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
            z-index: 1000;
            opacity: 0;
            transform: translateY(-20px);
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
            max-width: 400px;
        }
        
        .reminder-notification.show {
            opacity: 1;
            transform: translateY(0);
        }
        
        .reminder-notification h4 {
            margin-bottom: 10px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 10px;
        }
        

        .reminder-notification,
        .reminder-notification h4,
        .reminder-notification div,
        .reminder-notification strong,
        .reminder-notification .reminder-item {
            color: #000 !important;
        }

        .reminder-list {
            list-style-type: none;
            margin-top: 10px;
        }
        
        .reminder-item {
            padding: 5px 0;
            border-bottom: 1px dashed rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3);
        }
        
        .reminder-item:last-child {
            border-bottom: none;
        }
        
        .modal-overlay {
            position: fixed;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            right: 0;
            bottom: 0;
            background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            z-index: 2000;
            opacity: 0;
            visibility: hidden;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
        }
        
        .modal-overlay.show {
            opacity: 1;
            visibility: visible;
        }
        
        .modal {
            background-color: white;
            border-radius: 10px;
            padding: 30px;
            max-width: 500px;
            width: 90%;
            max-height: 80vh;
            overflow-y: auto;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
        }
        
        .modal h3 {
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            color: var(--primary-color);
        }
        
        .modal-buttons {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: flex-end;
            gap: 15px;
            margin-top: 25px;
        }
        
        .modal-btn {
            padding: 10px 20px;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 6px;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-weight: 600;
            transition: all 0.3s;
        }
        
        .modal-btn.primary {
            background-color: var(--secondary-color);
            color: white;
        }
        
        .modal-btn.secondary {
            background-color: #ecf0f1;
            color: var(--text-color);
        }
        
        .delete-task-btn {
            color: var(--danger-color);
        }
        
        .delete-task-btn:hover {
            color: #c0392b;
        }
        
        .no-tasks-message {
            text-align: center;
            padding: 20px;
            color: var(--light-text);
            font-style: italic;
        }
        
        .task-due-soon {
            background-color: #fff8e1;
            border-left-color: #ffc107;
        }
        
        .task-overdue {
            background-color: #ffebee;
            border-left-color: #f44336;
        }
        
        .attachment-btn {
            color: #9b59b6;
        }
        
        .attachment-btn:hover {
            color: #8e44ad;
        }
        
        .file-preview-modal {
            max-width: 800px;
        }
        
        .file-preview {
            max-width: 100%;
            max-height: 60vh;
            display: block;
            margin: 0 auto;
        }
        
        .unsupported-file {
            text-align: center;
            padding: 40px 20px;
            color: var(--light-text);
        }
        
        .unsupported-file i {
            font-size: 3rem;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            color: #bdc3c7;
        }
        
        .file-info {
            margin-top: 15px;
            font-size: 0.9rem;
            color: var(--light-text);
        }

        /* Loading indicator for file upload */
        .upload-progress {
            display: none;
            margin-top: 10px;
            text-align: center;
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            color: var(--secondary-color);
        }

        .upload-progress.active {
            display: block;
        }

        .file-input-wrapper {
            position: relative;
            overflow: hidden;
            display: inline-block;
            width: 100%;
        }

        .file-input-wrapper input[type=file] {
            position: absolute;
            left: 0;
            top: 0;
            opacity: 0;
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            cursor: pointer;
        }

        .file-input-label {
            display: block;
            padding: 8px 12px;
            background: #f8f9fa;
            border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
            border-radius: 4px;
            cursor: pointer;
            text-align: center;
            color: var(--light-text);
        }

        .file-input-label:hover {
            background: #e9ecef;
        }

        .file-input-label i {
            margin-right: 5px;
        }

        /* Objective editing buttons */
        .objective-actions {
            display: flex;
            gap: 10px;
            margin-left: 15px;
        }

        .objective-edit-btn, .objective-save-btn, .objective-cancel-btn {
            background: none;
            border: none;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-size: 1rem;
            padding: 5px;
            border-radius: 4px;
            transition: all 0.2s;
        }

        .objective-edit-btn {
            color: var(--secondary-color);
        }

        .objective-save-btn {
            color: var(--success-color);
            display: none;
        }

        .objective-cancel-btn {
            color: var(--danger-color);
            display: none;
        }

        .objective-edit-btn:hover {
            background-color: rgba(52, 152, 219, 0.1);
        }

        .objective-save-btn:hover {
            background-color: rgba(39, 174, 96, 0.1);
        }

        .objective-cancel-btn:hover {
            background-color: rgba(231, 76, 60, 0.1);
        }

        .objective-delete-btn {
            background: none;
            border: none;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-size: 1rem;
            padding: 5px;
            border-radius: 4px;
            color: var(--danger-color);
            transition: all 0.2s;
        }

        .objective-delete-btn:hover {
            background-color: rgba(231, 76, 60, 0.1);
        }

        /* Add new objective button */
        .add-objective-btn {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            gap: 10px;
            background-color: var(--success-color);
            color: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 8px;
            padding: 15px 25px;
            font-size: 1.1rem;
            font-weight: 600;
            cursor: pointer;
            margin: 20px auto;
            transition: all 0.3s;
        }

        .add-objective-btn:hover {
            background-color: #219653;
            transform: translateY(-2px);
        }

        /* Edit mode styling */
        .objective-card.editing .objective-title {
            display: none;
        }

        .objective-card.editing .objective-title-input {
            display: block;
        }

        .objective-card.editing .status-badge {
            display: none;
        }

        .objective-card.editing .status-select {
            display: block;
        }

        .objective-card.editing .objective-edit-btn {
            display: none;
        }

        .objective-card.editing .objective-save-btn,
        .objective-card.editing .objective-cancel-btn {
            display: block;
        }

        /* Calendar styling */
        .calendar-container {
            position: relative;
        }

        .calendar-input {
            position: relative;
        }

        .calendar-icon {
            position: absolute;
            right: 10px;
            top: 50%;
            transform: translateY(-50%);
            color: var(--light-text);
            cursor: pointer;
        }

        /* Preset periods */
        .preset-periods {
            display: flex;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            gap: 10px;
            margin-top: 15px;
        }

        .preset-btn {
            padding: 5px 10px;
            background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
            color: white;
            border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3);
            border-radius: 4px;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-size: 0.9rem;
            transition: all 0.3s;
        }

        .preset-btn:hover {
            background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2);
        }

        /* PDF Generation Progress */
        .pdf-progress {
            position: fixed;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            right: 0;
            bottom: 0;
            background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7);
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            z-index: 3000;
            color: white;
            font-size: 1.2rem;
            gap: 20px;
        }

        .pdf-progress.hidden {
            display: none;
        }

        .spinner {
            width: 50px;
            height: 50px;
            border: 5px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3);
            border-radius: 50%;
            border-top-color: white;
            animation: spin 1s ease-in-out infinite;
        }

        @keyframes spin {
            to { transform: rotate(360deg); }
        }

        .progress-text {
            margin-top: 10px;
        }

        /* Print styling */
        @media print {
            body * {
                visibility: hidden;
            }
            
            .print-section, .print-section * {
                visibility: visible;
            }
            
            .print-section {
                position: absolute;
                left: 0;
                top: 0;
                width: 100%;
            }
            
            .no-print {
                display: none !important;
            }
        }



        /* Sign-in Due Notes Pop-up */
        .due-notes-modal .modal {
            max-width: 680px;
        }

        .due-notes-summary {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(52, 152, 219, 0.12), rgba(39, 174, 96, 0.10));
            border: 1px solid rgba(52, 152, 219, 0.18);
            border-radius: 10px;
            padding: 14px 16px;
            margin-bottom: 18px;
            color: var(--primary-color);
            font-weight: 600;
        }

        .due-notes-list {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 12px;
            max-height: 48vh;
            overflow-y: auto;
            padding-right: 5px;
        }

        .due-note-card {
            border-radius: 10px;
            padding: 14px 16px;
            border-left: 5px solid var(--warning-color);
            background: #fff8e1;
            box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06);
        }

        .due-note-card.overdue {
            border-left-color: var(--danger-color);
            background: #ffebee;
        }

        .due-note-header {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            gap: 12px;
            align-items: flex-start;
            margin-bottom: 8px;
        }

        .due-note-title {
            font-weight: 700;
            color: var(--primary-color);
        }

        .due-note-badge {
            border-radius: 20px;
            padding: 4px 10px;
            font-size: 0.78rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            white-space: nowrap;
            background: rgba(243, 156, 18, 0.18);
            color: #b36b00;
        }

        .due-note-badge.overdue {
            background: rgba(231, 76, 60, 0.16);
            color: var(--danger-color);
        }

        .due-note-meta {
            font-size: 0.88rem;
            color: var(--light-text);
            margin-bottom: 6px;
        }

        .due-note-text {
            color: var(--text-color);
            line-height: 1.5;
        }

        .due-notes-empty {
            text-align: center;
            padding: 30px 20px;
            color: var(--light-text);
        }

        .due-notes-empty i {
            font-size: 2.5rem;
            color: var(--success-color);
            margin-bottom: 12px;
        }

        /* Sign Out Button Styles */
        .sign-out-btn {
            background-color: var(--danger-color);
            color: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 6px;
            padding: 10px 20px;
            font-size: 0.9rem;
            font-weight: 600;
            cursor: pointer;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 8px;
            transition: all 0.3s;
            margin-left: 10px;
        }

        .sign-out-btn:hover {
            background-color: #c0392b;
            transform: translateY(-2px);
        }

        .sign-out-btn-container {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            margin-left: auto;
            gap: 10px;
        }

        /* Admin controls */
        .admin-controls {
            margin-top: 10px;
            padding: 15px;
            background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
            border-radius: 6px;
            border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
        }

        .admin-btn {
            background-color: #e74c3c;
            color: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 6px;
            padding: 8px 15px;
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            font-weight: 600;
            cursor: pointer;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 8px;
            transition: all 0.3s;
        }

        .admin-btn:hover {
            background-color: #c0392b;
            transform: translateY(-2px);
        }

        .admin-btn.warning {
            background-color: #f39c12;
        }

        .admin-btn.warning:hover {
            background-color: #d35400;
        }

        .admin-btn.success {
            background-color: #27ae60;
        }

        .admin-btn.success:hover {
            background-color: #219653;
        }

        @media (max-width: 768px) {
            .sign-out-btn-container {
                margin-left: 0;
                margin-top: 10px;
                width: 100%;
                justify-content: flex-end;
            }
            
            .sign-out-btn {
                padding: 8px 15px;
                font-size: 0.85rem;
            }
        }
    
        /* =========================
           Division / Unit Intelligence Upgrade
           ========================= */
        .org-meta-panel { display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:8px; margin-top:10px; }
        .org-meta-badge { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:6px; padding:7px 11px; border-radius:999px; background:rgba(255,255,255,0.14); border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.18); color:#fff; font-size:0.86rem; font-weight:700; }
        .org-mode-banner { display:none; margin:0 0 20px 0; padding:14px 18px; border-radius:10px; background:linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(52,152,219,0.16), rgba(39,174,96,0.12)); border:1px solid rgba(52,152,219,0.22); color:#fff; font-weight:700; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between; gap:12px; flex-wrap:wrap; }
        .org-mode-banner.show { display:flex; }
        .org-readonly-note { font-size:0.88rem; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.82); font-weight:600; }
        .org-panel-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit, minmax(240px,1fr)); gap:15px; margin-top:15px; }
        .org-card { background:#f8fafc; border:1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius:12px; padding:15px; }
        .org-card h4 { color:var(--primary-color); margin-bottom:10px; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px; }
        .org-form-row { margin-bottom:12px; }
        .org-form-row label { display:block; font-size:0.88rem; font-weight:700; color:var(--primary-color); margin-bottom:6px; }
        .org-form-row input, .org-form-row select { width:100%; padding:10px 12px; border:1px solid var(--border-color); border-radius:7px; font-size:0.95rem; }
        .org-list { max-height:260px; overflow-y:auto; display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:8px; }
        .org-list-item { background:white; border:1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius:9px; padding:10px 12px; display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; gap:10px; }
        .org-list-item small { color:var(--light-text); display:block; }
        .org-mini-btn { border:none; border-radius:6px; padding:7px 10px; cursor:pointer; background:var(--secondary-color); color:#fff; font-weight:700; font-size:0.82rem; }
        .org-mini-btn.danger { background:var(--danger-color); }
        .org-mini-btn.success { background:var(--success-color); }
        .org-modal-wide { max-width:980px !important; }
        .org-assignment-warning { background:#fff8e1; border-left:5px solid var(--warning-color); border-radius:10px; padding:14px 16px; margin-bottom:14px; color:#3b2f00; font-weight:600; }
        .objective-owner-label { display:inline-flex; margin-left:8px; padding:3px 8px; border-radius:999px; background:rgba(52,152,219,0.12); color:var(--secondary-color); font-size:0.76rem; font-weight:800; vertical-align:middle; }
        body.org-readonly .objective-edit-btn, body.org-readonly .objective-save-btn, body.org-readonly .objective-cancel-btn, body.org-readonly .objective-delete-btn, body.org-readonly .add-task-btn, body.org-readonly .progress-input-container, body.org-readonly #add-objective, body.org-readonly #save-progress, body.org-readonly #reset-progress { display:none !important; }

    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <!-- Authentication Container (shown by default) -->
    <div id="auth-container" class="auth-container">
        <div class="auth-box">
            <div class="nca-logo-auth">
                <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="NCA Research Innovation Strategy and Policy logo">
            </div>
            
            <div class="auth-header">
                <h1><i class="fas fa-chart-line"></i><span class="dashboard-title">Performance Tracker Dashboard</span></h1>
                <p>Track your performance objectives and stay on target</p>
            </div>
            
            <div class="auth-tabs">
                <div class="auth-tab active" onclick="switchAuthTab('login')">Login</div>
                <div class="auth-tab" onclick="switchAuthTab('signup')">Sign Up</div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="auth-error" id="auth-error"></div>
            <div class="auth-success" id="auth-success"></div>
            
            <!-- Login Form -->
            <div id="login-form" class="auth-form active">
                <div class="form-group">
                    <label for="login-email">Email</label>
                    <input type="email" id="login-email" required placeholder="Enter your email">
                </div>
                <div class="form-group">
                    <label for="login-password">Password</label>
                    <input type="password" id="login-password" required placeholder="Enter your password">
                </div>
                <button type="button" class="auth-btn" onclick="login()">Login</button>
                <div class="auth-links">
                    <p>Don't have an account? <a onclick="switchAuthTab('signup')">Sign up here</a></p>
                    <p>Forgot password? <a onclick="forgotPassword()">Reset password</a></p>
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <!-- Signup Form -->
            <div id="signup-form" class="auth-form">
                <div class="form-group">
                    <label for="signup-name">Full Name</label>
                    <input type="text" id="signup-name" required placeholder="Enter your full name">
                </div>
                <div class="form-group">
                    <label for="signup-email">Email</label>
                    <input type="email" id="signup-email" required placeholder="Enter your email">
                </div>
                <div class="form-group">
                    <label for="signup-password">Password</label>
                    <input type="password" id="signup-password" required placeholder="Create a password (min. 6 characters)">
                </div>
                <div class="form-group">
                    <label for="signup-confirm-password">Confirm Password</label>
                    <input type="password" id="signup-confirm-password" required placeholder="Confirm your password">
                </div>
                <div class="form-group auth-recovery-note">
                    <small>Account recovery uses Firebase password reset by email. Security answers are not collected or stored.</small>
                </div>
                
                <button type="button" class="auth-btn" onclick="signup()">Create Account</button>
                <div class="auth-links">
                    <p>Already have an account? <a onclick="switchAuthTab('login')">Login here</a></p>
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <!-- Forgot Password Form -->
            <div id="forgot-form" class="auth-form">
                <div class="form-group">
                    <label for="forgot-email">Email</label>
                    <input type="email" id="forgot-email" required placeholder="Enter your email">
                </div>
                <button type="button" class="auth-btn" onclick="sendPasswordReset()">Send Reset Email</button>
                <div class="auth-links">
                    <p>Remember your password? <a onclick="switchAuthTab('login')">Back to login</a></p>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
    
    <!-- Dashboard Container (hidden by default) -->
    <div id="dashboard-container" class="dashboard-container">
        <div class="container">
            <header>
                <div class="header-left">
                    <div class="nca-logo-header">
                        <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="NCA Research Innovation Strategy and Policy logo">
                    </div>
                    
                    <h1><i class="fas fa-chart-line"></i> Performance Appraisal Progress Dashboard</h1>
                    <p class="subtitle">Track your performance objectives, key action points, and KPIs to stay on target</p>
                    <div class="date-info">
                        <div class="date-info-text">
                            <i class="far fa-calendar-alt"></i>
                            <span id="period-display">Mid-Year Review Period (June 2024 - July 2024)</span>
                            <span id="edit-period-btn" style="margin-left: 10px; font-size: 0.9rem;">
                                <i class="fas fa-edit"></i> Edit
                            </span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="date-range-inputs" id="date-range-inputs">
                            <input type="text" id="period-start" placeholder="Start Date (MM/YYYY)" class="calendar-input">
                            <i class="far fa-calendar calendar-icon" id="calendar-start-icon"></i>
                            <span>to</span>
                            <input type="text" id="period-end" placeholder="End Date (MM/YYYY)" class="calendar-input">
                            <i class="far fa-calendar calendar-icon" id="calendar-end-icon"></i>
                            <button id="save-period-btn">Save</button>
                            <button class="cancel-btn" id="cancel-period-btn">Cancel</button>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="preset-periods" id="preset-periods">
                        <button class="preset-btn" data-period="q1">Q1 (Jan-Mar)</button>
                        <button class="preset-btn" data-period="q2">Q2 (Apr-Jun)</button>
                        <button class="preset-btn" data-period="q3">Q3 (Jul-Sep)</button>
                        <button class="preset-btn" data-period="q4">Q4 (Oct-Dec)</button>
                        <button class="preset-btn" data-period="h1">H1 (Jan-Jun)</button>
                        <button class="preset-btn" data-period="h2">H2 (Jul-Dec)</button>
                        <button class="preset-btn" data-period="midyear">Mid-Year (Jun-Jul)</button>
                        <button class="preset-btn" data-period="yearend">Year-End (Nov-Dec)</button>
                    </div>
                    
                    <!-- Admin Controls (only visible to admin) -->
                    <div class="admin-controls" id="admin-controls" style="display: none;">
                        <h4 style="color: white; margin-bottom: 10px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;">
                            <i class="fas fa-shield-alt"></i> Administrator Controls
                        </h4>
                        <div style="display: flex; gap: 10px; flex-wrap: wrap;">
                            <button class="admin-btn warning" id="clear-all-profiles">
                                <i class="fas fa-trash"></i> Clear All Profiles
                            </button>
                            <button class="admin-btn success" id="reset-all-data">
                                <i class="fas fa-redo"></i> Reset All User Data
                            </button>
                            <button class="admin-btn" id="export-all-data">
                                <i class="fas fa-download"></i> Export All Data
                            </button>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                
                <div class="user-info">
                    <div class="user-avatar" id="user-avatar">JD</div>
                    <div>
                        <div id="user-name">John Doe</div>
                        <div class="user-menu">
                            <button class="user-menu-btn" id="user-menu-btn">
                                <span id="user-email">user@example.com</span>
                                <i class="fas fa-chevron-down"></i>
                            </button>
                            <div class="user-dropdown" id="user-dropdown">
                                <a href="#" class="user-dropdown-item">
                                    <i class="fas fa-user"></i> My Profile
                                </a>
                                <a href="#" class="user-dropdown-item">
                                    <i class="fas fa-cog"></i> Settings
                                </a>
                                <a href="#" class="user-dropdown-item logout" id="logout-btn">
                                    <i class="fas fa-sign-out-alt"></i> Logout
                                </a>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </header>
            
            <div class="dashboard-stats">
                <div class="stat-card">
                    <div class="stat-icon stat-1">
                        <i class="fas fa-bullseye"></i>
                    </div>
                    <div class="stat-info">
                        <h3 id="total-objectives">0</h3>
                        <p>Total Objectives</p>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="stat-card">
                    <div class="stat-icon stat-2">
                        <i class="fas fa-tasks"></i>
                    </div>
                    <div class="stat-info">
                        <h3 id="completed-tasks">0</h3>
                        <p>Completed Tasks</p>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="stat-card">
                    <div class="stat-icon stat-3">
                        <i class="fas fa-chart-pie"></i>
                    </div>
                    <div class="stat-info">
                        <h3 id="overall-progress">0%</h3>
                        <p>Overall Progress</p>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="stat-card">
                    <div class="stat-icon stat-4">
                        <i class="fas fa-paperclip"></i>
                    </div>
                    <div class="stat-info">
                        <h3 id="total-attachments">0</h3>
                        <p>Total Attachments</p>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="controls">
                <div class="filter-controls">
                    <button class="filter-btn active" data-filter="all">
                        <i class="fas fa-layer-group"></i> All Objectives
                    </button>
                    <button class="filter-btn" data-filter="not-started">
                        <i class="far fa-circle"></i> Not Started
                    </button>
                    <button class="filter-btn" data-filter="in-progress">
                        <i class="fas fa-spinner"></i> In Progress
                    </button>
                    <button class="filter-btn" data-filter="completed">
                        <i class="fas fa-check-circle"></i> Completed
                    </button>
                </div>
                <div class="view-controls">
                    <button class="view-btn active" data-view="grid">
                        <i class="fas fa-th-large"></i> Grid View
                    </button>
                    <button class="view-btn" data-view="list">
                        <i class="fas fa-list"></i> List View
                    </button>
                    <button class="action-btn reminders-btn" id="show-reminders">
                        <i class="fas fa-bell"></i> View Reminders
                    </button>
                    <button class="action-btn save-btn" id="save-progress">
                        <i class="fas fa-save"></i> Save Progress
                    </button>
                    <button class="action-btn pdf-btn" id="generate-pdf">
                        <i class="fas fa-file-pdf"></i> Export PDF
                    </button>
                    <button class="action-btn reset-btn" id="reset-progress">
                        <i class="fas fa-redo"></i> Reset All
                    </button>
                    <!-- Sign Out Button Added Here -->
                    <button class="action-btn sign-out-btn" id="sign-out-btn">
                        <i class="fas fa-sign-out-alt"></i> Sign Out
                    </button>
                </div>
            </div>

            <button class="add-objective-btn" id="add-objective">
                <i class="fas fa-plus"></i> Add New Objective
            </button>
            
            <div class="objectives-container grid-view" id="objectives-container">
                <!-- Objective cards will be dynamically inserted here -->
                <div class="empty-state">
                    <i class="fas fa-clipboard-list"></i>
                    <h3>No objectives yet</h3>
                    <p>Click "Add New Objective" to get started</p>
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="footer">
                <p>Mid-Year Objectives Dashboard - Last updated: <span id="current-date"></span></p>
                <p>Click the edit icon (<i class="fas fa-edit" style="color: var(--secondary-color);"></i>) to edit objective titles and status, note icon (<i class="fas fa-sticky-note"></i>) to add dated notes, paperclip icon (<i class="fas fa-paperclip"></i>) to attach evidence files, edit icon (<i class="fas fa-edit"></i>) to edit tasks, and trash icon (<i class="fas fa-trash"></i>) to delete tasks.</p>
            </div>
            
            <div class="notification" id="notification">
                <i class="fas fa-check-circle"></i>
                <span id="notification-text">Progress saved successfully!</span>
            </div>
            
            <div class="reminder-notification" id="reminder-notification">
                <h4><i class="fas fa-bell"></i> Task Reminders</h4>
                <div id="reminder-content">
                    <!-- Reminders will be inserted here -->
                </div>
                <div style="text-align: right; margin-top: 15px;">
                    <button id="dismiss-reminders" style="padding: 5px 15px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.75); border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.18); color: #000; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer;">Dismiss</button>
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <!-- PDF Generation Progress Modal -->
            <div class="pdf-progress hidden" id="pdf-progress">
                <div class="spinner"></div>
                <div class="progress-text">Generating PDF report...</div>
                <div id="pdf-progress-details" style="font-size: 0.9rem; margin-top: 10px; text-align: center; max-width: 300px;">
                    Please wait while we prepare your report. This may take a moment.
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <!-- Calendar Modal -->
            <div class="calendar-modal" id="calendar-modal" style="display: none;">
                <div class="calendar-header">
                    <div class="calendar-nav">
                        <button id="calendar-prev"><i class="fas fa-chevron-left"></i></button>
                        <button id="calendar-next"><i class="fas fa-chevron-right"></i></button>
                    </div>
                    <div class="calendar-month-year" id="calendar-month-year">June 2024</div>
                    <button id="calendar-close" style="background: none; border: none; cursor: pointer; font-size: 1.2rem;">Ã—</button>
                </div>
                <div class="calendar-weekdays">
                    <div>Sun</div>
                    <div>Mon</div>
                    <div>Tue</div>
                    <div>Wed</div>
                    <div>Thu</div>
                    <div>Fri</div>
                    <div>Sat</div>
                </div>
                <div class="calendar-days" id="calendar-days">
                    <!-- Calendar days will be dynamically inserted here -->
                </div>
                <div class="calendar-footer">
                    <div id="selected-date-display"></div>
                    <button id="calendar-select-btn" style="padding: 8px 15px; background-color: var(--secondary-color); color: white; border: none; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer;">Select</button>
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <!-- PDF Settings Modal -->
            <div class="modal-overlay" id="pdf-modal">
                <div class="modal">
                    <h3><i class="fas fa-file-pdf"></i> Export Dashboard as PDF</h3>
                    <p>Configure your PDF export settings:</p>
                    
                    <div style="margin: 20px 0;">
                        <div style="margin-bottom: 15px;">
                            <label style="display: block; margin-bottom: 5px; font-weight: 600;">Document Title:</label>
                            <input type="text" id="pdf-title" value="Mid-Year Objectives Progress Report" style="width: 100%; padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid var(--border-color); border-radius: 4px;">
                        </div>
                        
                        <div style="margin-bottom: 15px;">
                            <label style="display: block; margin-bottom: 5px; font-weight: 600;">Include Notes:</label>
                            <div>
                                <input type="radio" id="notes-yes" name="include-notes" value="yes" checked>
                                <label for="notes-yes" style="margin-right: 15px;">Yes, include all notes</label>
                                <input type="radio" id="notes-no" name="include-notes" value="no">
                                <label for="notes-no">No, exclude notes</label>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        
                        <div style="margin-bottom: 15px;">
                            <label style="display: block; margin-bottom: 5px; font-weight: 600;">Include Attachments List:</label>
                                <div>
                                <input type="radio" id="attachments-yes" name="include-attachments" value="yes" checked>
                                <label for="attachments-yes" style="margin-right: 15px;">Yes, include attachments list</label>
                                <input type="radio" id="attachments-no" name="include-attachments" value="no">
                                <label for="attachments-no">No, exclude attachments</label>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        
                        <div style="margin-bottom: 15px;">
                            <label style="display: block; margin-bottom: 5px; font-weight: 600;">Page Orientation:</label>
                            <div>
                                <input type="radio" id="orientation-portrait" name="orientation" value="portrait" checked>
                                <label for="orientation-portrait" style="margin-right: 15px;">Portrait</label>
                                <input type="radio" id="orientation-landscape" name="orientation" value="landscape">
                                <label for="orientation-landscape">Landscape</label>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        
                        <div style="margin-bottom: 15px;">
                            <label style="display: block; margin-bottom: 5px; font-weight: 600;">Page Size:</label>
                            <div>
                                <select id="page-size" style="width: 100%; padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid var(--border-color); border-radius: 4px;">
                                    <option value="a4">A4 (210mm Ã— 297mm)</option>
                                    <option value="letter">Letter (8.5in Ã— 11in)</option>
                                    <option value="legal">Legal (8.5in Ã— 14in)</option>
                                    <option value="a3">A3 (297mm Ã— 420mm)</option>
                                </select>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        
                        <div style="margin-bottom: 15px;">
                            <label style="display: block; margin-bottom: 5px; font-weight: 600;">Include Date Range:</label>
                            <div>
                                <input type="radio" id="date-range-yes" name="include-date-range" value="yes" checked>
                                <label for="date-range-yes" style="margin-right: 15px;">Yes, include review period</label>
                                <input type="radio" id="date-range-no" name="include-date-range" value="no">
                                <label for="date-range-no">No, exclude date range</label>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    
                    <div class="modal-buttons">
                        <button class="modal-btn secondary" id="cancel-pdf">Cancel</button>
                        <button class="modal-btn primary" id="generate-pdf-now">Generate PDF</button>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <!-- Reminders Modal -->
            <div class="modal-overlay" id="reminders-modal">
                <div class="modal">
                    <h3><i class="fas fa-bell"></i> Task Reminders</h3>
                    <div id="reminders-list-container">
                        <!-- Reminders list will be inserted here -->
                    </div>
                    <div class="modal-buttons">
                        <button class="modal-btn secondary" id="close-reminders">Close</button>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
            

            <!-- Sign-in Due Notes Modal -->
            <div class="modal-overlay due-notes-modal" id="due-notes-modal">
                <div class="modal">
                    <h3><i class="fas fa-bell" style="color: var(--warning-color);"></i> Due Notes Notification</h3>
                    <div id="due-notes-content">
                        <!-- Due notes will be inserted here immediately after sign-in -->
                    </div>
                    <div class="modal-buttons">
                        <button class="modal-btn secondary" id="close-due-notes">Close</button>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- File Preview Modal -->
            <div class="modal-overlay" id="file-preview-modal">
                <div class="modal file-preview-modal">
                    <h3><i class="fas fa-file"></i> File Preview</h3>
                    <div id="file-preview-container">
                        <!-- File preview will be inserted here -->
                    </div>
                    <div class="modal-buttons">
                        <button class="modal-btn secondary" id="close-file-preview">Close</button>
                        <a id="download-file-btn" class="modal-btn primary" download>
                            <i class="fas fa-download"></i> Download
                        </a>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Delete Objective Confirmation Modal -->
            <div class="modal-overlay" id="delete-objective-modal">
                <div class="modal">
                    <h3><i class="fas fa-exclamation-triangle" style="color: var(--danger-color);"></i> Delete Objective</h3>
                    <p id="delete-objective-text">Are you sure you want to delete this objective? This action cannot be undone and will delete all associated tasks, notes, and attachments.</p>
                    <div class="modal-buttons">
                        <button class="modal-btn secondary" id="cancel-delete-objective">Cancel</button>
                        <button class="modal-btn primary" id="confirm-delete-objective" style="background-color: var(--danger-color);">Delete Objective</button>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Admin Confirmation Modal -->
            <div class="modal-overlay" id="admin-confirm-modal">
                <div class="modal">
                    <h3><i class="fas fa-exclamation-triangle" style="color: var(--danger-color);"></i> Administrator Action Required</h3>
                    <p id="admin-confirm-text">Are you sure you want to perform this action?</p>
                    <div class="modal-buttons">
                        <button class="modal-btn secondary" id="cancel-admin-action">Cancel</button>
                        <button class="modal-btn primary" id="confirm-admin-action" style="background-color: var(--danger-color);">Confirm</button>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Print Section (hidden until needed) -->
        <div id="print-section" class="print-section" style="display: none;"></div>
    </div>

    <script>
        // =========================
        // FIREBASE INTEGRATION
        // =========================

        // Your Firebase configuration - REPLACE WITH YOUR VALUES
        

        // For Firebase JS SDK v7.20.0 and later, measurementId is optional
        const firebaseConfig = {
        apiKey: "AIzaSyA3CqhXhc_vRk3ozrVcdSnrG5xrWRbShJ0",
        authDomain: "nca-performance-dashboard.firebaseapp.com",
        projectId: "nca-performance-dashboard",
        storageBucket: "nca-performance-dashboard.firebasestorage.app",
