        messagingSenderId: "96934659510",
        appId: "1:96934659510:web:9e725ffe6be2e07c2e2d17",
        measurementId: "G-L3NK5MDXL0"
};


        // Initialize Firebase
        const app = firebase.initializeApp(firebaseConfig);
        const auth = firebase.auth();
        const db = firebase.firestore();

        // Expose Firebase handles for the Division / Unit upgrade layer.
        // The main file uses const variables, so the extension needs safe window aliases.
        window.app = app;
        window.auth = auth;
        window.db = db;

        // =========================
        // AUTHENTICATION FUNCTIONS
        // =========================

        // Admin email (for special admin features)
        const ADMIN_EMAIL = "admin@nca.gov";

        // Screen switching
        function switchAuthTab(tab) {
            // Update tabs
            document.querySelectorAll('.auth-tab').forEach(t => {
                t.classList.remove('active');
            });
            
            // Hide all auth forms
            document.querySelectorAll('.auth-form').forEach(form => {
                form.classList.remove('active');
            });
            
            if (tab === 'login' || tab === 'signup') {
                document.querySelectorAll('.auth-tab').forEach(t => {
                    if (t.textContent.includes(tab === 'login' ? 'Login' : 'Sign Up')) {
                        t.classList.add('active');
                    }
                });
                document.getElementById(`${tab}-form`).classList.add('active');
            } else if (tab === 'forgot') {
                document.getElementById('forgot-form').classList.add('active');
            }
            
            // Clear any error messages
            document.getElementById('auth-error').style.display = 'none';
            document.getElementById('auth-success').style.display = 'none';
        }

        function showAuthError(message) {
            const errorElement = document.getElementById('auth-error');
            errorElement.textContent = message;
            errorElement.style.display = 'block';
            
            setTimeout(() => {
                errorElement.style.display = 'none';
            }, 5000);
        }

        function showAuthSuccess(message) {
            const successElement = document.getElementById('auth-success');
            successElement.textContent = message;
            successElement.style.display = 'block';
            
            setTimeout(() => {
                successElement.style.display = 'none';
            }, 5000);
        }

        // Sign up logic with Firebase
        async function signup() {
            const name = document.getElementById('signup-name').value.trim();
            const email = document.getElementById('signup-email').value.trim().toLowerCase();
            const pass = document.getElementById('signup-password').value;
            const confirm = document.getElementById('signup-confirm-password').value;

            if (!name || !email || !pass || !confirm) {
                return showAuthError("All fields are required");
            }

            if (pass !== confirm) {
                return showAuthError("Passwords do not match");
            }

            if (pass.length < 6) {
                return showAuthError("Password must be at least 6 characters");
            }

            try {
                // 1. Create Firebase Authentication user
                const userCredential = await auth.createUserWithEmailAndPassword(email, pass);
                const user = userCredential.user;
                
                // 2. Save user data to Firestore
                await db.collection('users').doc(user.uid).set({
                    uid: user.uid,
                    name: name,
                    email: email,
                    createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),
                    isAdmin: email === ADMIN_EMAIL.toLowerCase(),
                    role: email === ADMIN_EMAIL.toLowerCase() ? 'systemAdmin' : 'employee'
                });
                
                // 3. Create initial dashboard data
                const initialData = {
                    objectivesData: [],
                    reviewPeriod: {
                        start: 'June 2024',
                        end: 'July 2024',
                        display: 'Mid-Year Review Period (June 2024 - July 2024)'
                    },
                    lastUpdated: new Date().toISOString()
                };
                
                await db.collection('dashboards').doc(user.uid).set(initialData);
                
                showAuthSuccess("Account created successfully!");
                switchAuthTab('login');
                
            } catch (error) {
                console.error('Signup error:', error);
                if (error.code === 'auth/email-already-in-use') {
                    showAuthError("Email already exists");
                } else if (error.code === 'auth/invalid-email') {
                    showAuthError("Invalid email address");
                } else if (error.code === 'auth/weak-password') {
                    showAuthError("Password is too weak");
                } else {
                    showAuthError(error.message);
                }
            }
        }

        // Login logic with Firebase
        async function login() {
            const email = document.getElementById('login-email').value.trim().toLowerCase();
            const pass = document.getElementById('login-password').value;

            try {
                // Sign in with Firebase
                const userCredential = await auth.signInWithEmailAndPassword(email, pass);
                const user = userCredential.user;
                
                // Get user data from Firestore
                const userDoc = await db.collection('users').doc(user.uid).get();
                
                if (!userDoc.exists) {
                    await auth.signOut();
                    return showAuthError("User data not found. Please contact administrator.");
                }
                
                const userData = userDoc.data();
                const userEmail = (userData.email || user.email || '').toLowerCase();
                const isPrimaryAdmin = userEmail === ADMIN_EMAIL.toLowerCase();
                
                // Set current user in session storage
                const currentUser = {
                    uid: user.uid,
                    name: userData.name,
                    email: userEmail,
                    isAdmin: isPrimaryAdmin || userData.isAdmin || false,
                    division: isPrimaryAdmin ? '' : (userData.division || ''),
                    unit: isPrimaryAdmin ? '' : (userData.unit || ''),
                    role: isPrimaryAdmin ? 'systemAdmin' : (userData.role || (userData.isAdmin ? 'systemAdmin' : 'employee')),
                    profileCompleted: isPrimaryAdmin || !!(userData.division && userData.unit)
                };
                
                sessionStorage.setItem('currentUser', JSON.stringify(currentUser));
                
                // Load dashboard data
                const dashboardDoc = await db.collection('dashboards').doc(user.uid).get();
                const dashboardData = dashboardDoc.exists ? dashboardDoc.data() : null;
                
                // Initialize dashboard
                initializeDashboard(dashboardData);
                
                // Update UI
                document.getElementById('user-name').textContent = userData.name;
                document.getElementById('user-email').textContent = userData.email;
                
                // Update avatar with initials
                if (currentUser.isAdmin) {
                    document.getElementById('user-avatar').textContent = "AD";
                    document.getElementById('admin-controls').style.display = 'block';
                    setupAdminEventListeners();
                } else {
                    const initials = userData.name.split(' ').map(n => n[0]).join('').toUpperCase();
                    document.getElementById('user-avatar').textContent = initials.substring(0, 2);
                    document.getElementById('admin-controls').style.display = 'none';
                }
                
                // Show dashboard
                document.getElementById('auth-container').style.display = 'none';
                document.getElementById('dashboard-container').style.display = 'block';

                // Force the organizational setup check immediately after login.
                // Existing users without a division/unit will be prompted here.
                if (!isPrimaryAdmin && window.NCA_ORG_UPGRADE && typeof window.NCA_ORG_UPGRADE.bootstrapOrgLayer === 'function') {
                    setTimeout(() => window.NCA_ORG_UPGRADE.bootstrapOrgLayer(true), 150);
                } else if (isPrimaryAdmin && window.NCA_ORG_UPGRADE && typeof window.NCA_ORG_UPGRADE.bootstrapOrgLayer === 'function') {
                    setTimeout(() => window.NCA_ORG_UPGRADE.bootstrapOrgLayer(false), 150);
                }

                setTimeout(showDueNotesOnSignIn, 500);
                
            } catch (error) {
                console.error('Login error:', error);
                if (error.code === 'auth/user-not-found' || error.code === 'auth/wrong-password') {
                    showAuthError("Invalid login credentials");
                } else if (error.code === 'auth/invalid-email') {
                    showAuthError("Invalid email address");
                } else if (error.code === 'auth/user-disabled') {
                    showAuthError("Account has been disabled");
                } else {
                    showAuthError(error.message);
                }
            }
        }

        // Forgot password function
        async function sendPasswordReset() {
            const email = document.getElementById('forgot-email').value.trim().toLowerCase();
            
            if (!email) {
                return showAuthError("Please enter your email address");
            }
            
            try {
                await auth.sendPasswordResetEmail(email);
                showAuthSuccess("Password reset email sent! Check your inbox.");
                setTimeout(() => switchAuthTab('login'), 3000);
            } catch (error) {
                console.error('Password reset error:', error);
                if (error.code === 'auth/user-not-found') {
                    showAuthError("No account found with this email");
                } else {
                    showAuthError(error.message);
                }
            }
        }

        // Forgot password link handler
        function forgotPassword() {
            switchAuthTab('forgot');
        }

        // Sign Out Function
        async function signOut() {
            try {
                await auth.signOut();
                sessionStorage.removeItem('currentUser');
                
                // Hide dashboard
                document.getElementById('dashboard-container').style.display = 'none';
                
                // Show login screen
                document.getElementById('auth-container').style.display = 'flex';
                
                // Switch to login tab
                switchAuthTab('login');
                
                // Clear login form
                document.getElementById('login-email').value = '';
                document.getElementById('login-password').value = '';
                
                // Clear dashboard data
                objectivesData = [];
                
                // Show success message
                showAuthSuccess("You have been signed out successfully");
            } catch (error) {
                console.error('Sign out error:', error);
            }
        }

        // =========================
        // ADMIN FUNCTIONS
        // =========================
        
        let pendingAdminAction = null;
        
        function setupAdminEventListeners() {
            // Clear All Profiles button
            document.getElementById('clear-all-profiles').addEventListener('click', function() {
                pendingAdminAction = 'clearProfiles';
                document.getElementById('admin-confirm-text').textContent = 
                    "Are you sure you want to clear ALL user profiles? This will delete all user accounts and their data. This action cannot be undone!";
                document.getElementById('admin-confirm-modal').classList.add('show');
            });
            
            // Reset All Data button
            document.getElementById('reset-all-data').addEventListener('click', function() {
                pendingAdminAction = 'resetData';
                document.getElementById('admin-confirm-text').textContent = 
                    "Are you sure you want to reset ALL user data? This will clear all objectives, tasks, notes, and attachments for all users, but keep the user accounts. This action cannot be undone!";
                document.getElementById('admin-confirm-modal').classList.add('show');
            });
            
            // Export All Data button
            document.getElementById('export-all-data').addEventListener('click', function() {
                exportAllData();
            });
            
            // Admin confirmation modal
            document.getElementById('cancel-admin-action').addEventListener('click', function() {
                document.getElementById('admin-confirm-modal').classList.remove('show');
                pendingAdminAction = null;
            });
            
            document.getElementById('confirm-admin-action').addEventListener('click', function() {
                if (pendingAdminAction === 'clearProfiles') {
                    clearAllProfiles();
                } else if (pendingAdminAction === 'resetData') {
                    resetAllUserData();
                }
                document.getElementById('admin-confirm-modal').classList.remove('show');
                pendingAdminAction = null;
            });
        }
        
        async function clearAllProfiles() {
            try {
                // Get all users from Firestore
                const usersSnapshot = await db.collection('users').get();
                const batch = db.batch();
                
                usersSnapshot.forEach(doc => {
                    batch.delete(doc.ref);
                });
                
                // Also delete all dashboard data
                const dashboardsSnapshot = await db.collection('dashboards').get();
                dashboardsSnapshot.forEach(doc => {
                    batch.delete(doc.ref);
                });
                
                await batch.commit();
                
                // Show success notification
                showNotification('All user profiles and data have been cleared successfully.');
                
            } catch (error) {
                console.error('Error clearing profiles:', error);
                showNotification('Error clearing profiles: ' + error.message);
            }
        }
        
        async function resetAllUserData() {
            try {
                // Get all users from Firestore
                const usersSnapshot = await db.collection('users').get();
                const batch = db.batch();
                
                usersSnapshot.forEach(doc => {
                    // Reset dashboard data for each user
                    const emptyData = {
                        objectivesData: [],
                        reviewPeriod: {
                            start: 'June 2024',
                            end: 'July 2024',
                            display: 'Mid-Year Review Period (June 2024 - July 2024)'
                        },
                        lastUpdated: new Date().toISOString()
                    };
                    
                    batch.set(db.collection('dashboards').doc(doc.id), emptyData);
                });
                
                await batch.commit();
                
                // Show success notification
                showNotification('All user data has been reset successfully.');
                
                // If admin is currently logged in, refresh their view
                const user = JSON.parse(sessionStorage.getItem('currentUser') || '{}');
                if (user && user.isAdmin) {
                    objectivesData = [];
                    renderObjectives();
                    updateStats();
                }
                
            } catch (error) {
                console.error('Error resetting data:', error);
                showNotification('Error resetting data: ' + error.message);
            }
        }
        
        async function exportAllData() {
            try {
                const usersSnapshot = await db.collection('users').get();
                const allData = {
                    exportedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
                    totalUsers: usersSnapshot.size,
                    users: []
                };
                
                // Collect data for each user
                for (const userDoc of usersSnapshot.docs) {
                    const userData = userDoc.data();
                    const dashboardDoc = await db.collection('dashboards').doc(userDoc.id).get();
                    
                    allData.users.push({
                        uid: userDoc.id,
                        name: userData.name,
                        email: userData.email,
                        isAdmin: userData.isAdmin || false,
                        data: dashboardDoc.exists ? dashboardDoc.data() : null
                    });
                }
                
                // Create download link
                const dataStr = JSON.stringify(allData, null, 2);
                const dataUri = 'data:application/json;charset=utf-8,'+ encodeURIComponent(dataStr);
                
                const exportFileDefaultName = `nca_dashboard_export_${new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10)}.json`;
                
                const linkElement = document.createElement('a');
                linkElement.setAttribute('href', dataUri);
                linkElement.setAttribute('download', exportFileDefaultName);
                linkElement.click();
                
                showNotification('All data exported successfully.');
            } catch (error) {
                console.error('Error exporting data:', error);
                showNotification('Error exporting data: ' + error.message);
            }
        }

        // =========================
        // DASHBOARD LOGIC
        // =========================
        
        let objectivesData = [];
        let reviewPeriod = {
            start: 'June 2024',
            end: 'July 2024',
            display: 'Mid-Year Review Period (June 2024 - July 2024)'
        };
        
        // Dashboard state management
        let currentFilter = 'all';
        let currentView = 'grid';
        
        // Calendar state
        let calendarState = {
            currentMonth: new Date().getMonth(),
            currentYear: new Date().getFullYear(),
            selectedDate: null,
            inputTarget: null
        };
        
        // Month names
        const monthNames = [
            'January', 'February', 'March', 'April', 'May', 'June',
            'July', 'August', 'September', 'October', 'November', 'December'
        ];
        
        // Initialize dashboard with data
        function initializeDashboard(dashboardData) {
            if (dashboardData) {
                objectivesData = dashboardData.objectivesData || [];
                reviewPeriod = dashboardData.reviewPeriod || reviewPeriod;
            } else {
                // Empty dashboard for new users or admin view
                objectivesData = [];
            }
            
            // Set current date
            const now = new Date();
            const options = { year: 'numeric', month: 'long', day: 'numeric' };
            document.getElementById('current-date').textContent = now.toLocaleDateString('en-US', options);
            
            // Render all objectives
            renderObjectives();
            updateStats();
            
            // Setup event listeners for dashboard
            setupDashboardEventListeners();
            
            // Check for reminders on load
            setTimeout(checkReminders, 1000);
            
            // Initialize calendar
            renderCalendar();
            
            // Update period display
            updatePeriodDisplay();
        }

        // Save dashboard data to Firebase
        async function saveDashboard() {
            const user = JSON.parse(sessionStorage.getItem('currentUser') || '{}');
            if (!user.uid || user.isAdmin) return; // Don't save for admin
            
            const dashboardData = {
                objectivesData: objectivesData,
                reviewPeriod: reviewPeriod,
                lastUpdated: new Date().toISOString()
            };
            
            try {
                // Save to Firestore
                await db.collection('dashboards').doc(user.uid).set(dashboardData);
                showNotification('Progress saved and synced across devices!');
            } catch (error) {
                console.error('Error saving to Firestore:', error);
                // Fallback to localStorage
                localStorage.setItem("dashboardData_" + user.email, JSON.stringify(dashboardData));
                showNotification('Saved locally (offline mode)');
            }
        }

        // Update period display
        function updatePeriodDisplay() {
            const displayText = `${reviewPeriod.display}`;
            document.getElementById('period-display').textContent = displayText;
        }

        // Show notification
        function showNotification(message) {
            const notification = document.getElementById('notification');
            const notificationText = document.getElementById('notification-text');
            
            notificationText.textContent = message;
            notification.classList.add('show');
            
            setTimeout(() => {
                notification.classList.remove('show');
            }, 3000);
        }
        function escapeHTML(value) {
            return String(value ?? '').replace(/[&<>"']/g, function (char) {
                return ({'&':'&amp;','<':'&lt;','>':'&gt;','"':'&quot;',"'":'&#39;'}[char]);
            });
        }

        function escapeAttribute(value) {
            return escapeHTML(value).replace(/`/g, '&#96;');
        }
        // Render objectives based on current filter
        function renderObjectives() {
            const container = document.getElementById('objectives-container');
            container.innerHTML = '';
            
            let filteredObjectives = objectivesData;
            
            if (currentFilter !== 'all') {
                filteredObjectives = objectivesData.filter(obj => obj.status === currentFilter);
            }
            
            if (filteredObjectives.length === 0) {
                container.innerHTML = `
                    <div class="empty-state">
                        <i class="fas fa-clipboard-list"></i>
                        <h3>No objectives yet</h3>
                        <p>Click "Add New Objective" to get started</p>
                    </div>
                `;
                return;
            }
            
            filteredObjectives.forEach(objective => {
                const card = createObjectiveCard(objective);
                container.appendChild(card);
            });
            
            // Update view
            updateView();
        }

        // Create objective card
        function createObjectiveCard(objective) {
            const card = document.createElement('div');
            card.className = 'objective-card';
            card.setAttribute('data-objective-id', objective.id);
            
            let statusText = '';
            let statusClass = '';
            switch(objective.status) {
                case 'not-started': 
                    statusText = 'Not Started'; 
                    statusClass = 'status-not-started';
                    break;
                case 'in-progress': 
                    statusText = 'In Progress'; 
                    statusClass = 'status-in-progress';
                    break;
                case 'completed': 
                    statusText = 'Completed'; 
                    statusClass = 'status-completed';
                    break;
            }
            
            const progressColor = getProgressColor(objective.progress);
            
            card.innerHTML = `
                <div class="card-header">
                    <div class="objective-title">${escapeHTML(getObjectiveDisplayTitle(objective))}</div>
                    <input type="text" class="objective-title-input" value="${escapeAttribute(getObjectiveEditTitle(objective))}">
                    
                    <div class="status-badge ${statusClass}">${statusText}</div>
                    <select class="status-select">
                        <option value="not-started" ${objective.status === 'not-started' ? 'selected' : ''}>Not Started</option>
                        <option value="in-progress" ${objective.status === 'in-progress' ? 'selected' : ''}>In Progress</option>
                        <option value="completed" ${objective.status === 'completed' ? 'selected' : ''}>Completed</option>
                    </select>
                    
                    <div class="objective-actions">
                        <button class="objective-edit-btn" title="Edit Objective">
                            <i class="fas fa-edit"></i>
                        </button>
                        <button class="objective-save-btn" title="Save Changes">
                            <i class="fas fa-check"></i>
                        </button>
                        <button class="objective-cancel-btn" title="Cancel Edit">
                            <i class="fas fa-times"></i>
                        </button>
                        <button class="objective-delete-btn" title="Delete Objective">
                            <i class="fas fa-trash"></i>
                        </button>
                    </div>
                </div>
                
                <div class="card-content">
                    <div class="progress-section">
                        <div class="progress-header">
                            <span class="progress-label">Overall Progress</span>
                            <span class="progress-value">${objective.progress}%</span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="progress-bar">
                            <div class="progress-fill" style="width: ${objective.progress}%; background-color: ${progressColor};"></div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="progress-input-container">
                            <input type="range" class="progress-slider" min="0" max="100" value="${objective.progress}">
                            <input type="number" class="progress-number" min="0" max="100" value="${objective.progress}">
                            <span>%</span>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    
                    <div class="action-kpi-container">
                        <div class="action-points">
                            <div class="section-title">
                                Key Action Points
                                <button class="add-task-btn" data-type="action" data-objective-id="${objective.id}">
                                    <i class="fas fa-plus"></i> Add
                                </button>
                            </div>
                            <ul class="task-list" id="action-list-${objective.id}">
                                ${objective.actionPoints.map((task, index) => createTaskHTML(task, index, 'action', objective.id)).join('')}
                            </ul>
                        </div>
                        
                        <div class="kpis">
                            <div class="section-title">
                                Key Performance Indicators
                                <button class="add-task-btn" data-type="kpi" data-objective-id="${objective.id}">
                                    <i class="fas fa-plus"></i> Add
                                </button>
                            </div>
                            <ul class="task-list" id="kpi-list-${objective.id}">
                                ${objective.kpis.map((task, index) => createTaskHTML(task, index, 'kpi', objective.id)).join('')}
                            </ul>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            `;
            
            return card;
        }

        // Create task HTML
        function createTaskHTML(task, index, type, objectiveId) {
            const hasNotes = task.notes && task.notes.length > 0;
            const hasAttachments = task.attachments && task.attachments.length > 0;
            
            const notesHTML = hasNotes ? task.notes.map((note, noteIndex) => `
                <div class="note-item">
                    <div class="note-header">
                        <span class="note-date">${escapeHTML(formatDate(note.date))}</span>
                        <div>
                            <button class="edit-note-btn" title="Edit Note" data-task-index="${index}" data-task-type="${type}" data-objective-id="${objectiveId}" data-note-index="${noteIndex}">
                                <i class="fas fa-edit"></i>
                            </button>
                            <button class="delete-note-btn" title="Delete Note" data-task-index="${index}" data-task-type="${type}" data-objective-id="${objectiveId}" data-note-index="${noteIndex}">
                                <i class="fas fa-times"></i>
                            </button>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="note-text">${escapeHTML(note.text)}</div>
                </div>
            `).join('') : '';
            
            const attachmentsHTML = hasAttachments ? task.attachments.map(attachment => `
                <div class="attachment-item">
                    <div class="attachment-header">
                        <span class="attachment-name">${escapeHTML(attachment.name)}</span>
                        <button class="delete-attachment-btn" data-task-index="${index}" data-task-type="${type}" data-objective-id="${objectiveId}" data-attachment-index="${task.attachments.indexOf(attachment)}">
                            <i class="fas fa-times"></i>
                        </button>
                    </div>
                    <div class="attachment-info">
                        <span class="attachment-size">${formatFileSize(attachment.size)}</span>
                        <button class="view-attachment-btn" data-file="${escapeAttribute(attachment.data)}" data-filename="${escapeAttribute(attachment.name)}">
                            <i class="fas fa-eye"></i> View
                        </button>
                    </div>
                </div>
            `).join('') : '';

            const taskOwners = Array.isArray(task.owners) ? task.owners.filter(Boolean) : (task.ownerName ? [task.ownerName] : []);
            const taskOwnersHTML = taskOwners.length ? `
                <div class="task-owner-meta" style="font-size:0.78rem;color:#64748b;margin-top:4px;font-weight:600;">
                    <i class="fas fa-users"></i> ${taskOwners.map(owner => escapeHTML(owner)).join(', ')}
                </div>
            ` : '';

            return `
                <li class="task-item ${task.completed ? 'completed' : ''}">
                    <div class="task-content">
                        <input type="checkbox" class="task-checkbox" ${task.completed ? 'checked' : ''} 
                               data-task-index="${index}" data-task-type="${type}" data-objective-id="${objectiveId}">
                        <div class="task-text-container">
                            <div class="task-text">${escapeHTML(task.text)}</div>
                            ${taskOwnersHTML}
                            <input type="text" class="task-text-input" value="${escapeAttribute(task.text)}">
                        </div>
                        <div class="task-actions">
                            <button class="task-action-btn edit-task-btn" title="Edit Task">
                                <i class="fas fa-edit"></i>
                            </button>
                            <button class="task-action-btn note-btn ${hasNotes ? 'active' : ''}" title="Add Note">
                                <i class="fas fa-sticky-note"></i>
                            </button>
                            <button class="task-action-btn attachment-btn ${hasAttachments ? 'active' : ''}" title="Add Attachment">
                                <i class="fas fa-paperclip"></i>
                            </button>
                            <button class="task-action-btn delete-task-btn" title="Delete Task">
                                <i class="fas fa-trash"></i>
                            </button>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    
                    <div class="task-notes-section">
                        <span class="task-section-label">Notes:</span>
                        <div class="notes-container">
                            ${notesHTML}
                        </div>
                        <div class="add-note-form" style="display: none;">
                            <div class="note-form-row">
                                <input type="date" class="note-date-input" value="${new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]}">
                            </div>
                            <textarea class="note-text-input" placeholder="Enter note text..."></textarea>
                            <div class="note-form-buttons">
                                <button class="note-form-btn cancel">Cancel</button>
                                <button class="note-form-btn save">Save Note</button>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <button class="add-note-btn" style="margin-top: 10px; padding: 5px 10px; background: #f8f9fa; border: 1px dashed #ccc; border-radius: 4px; width: 100%; cursor: pointer;">
                            <i class="fas fa-plus"></i> Add Note
                        </button>
                    </div>
                    
                    <div class="task-attachments-section">
                        <span class="task-section-label">Attachments:</span>
                        <div class="attachments-container">
                            ${attachmentsHTML}
                        </div>
                        <div class="add-attachment-form" style="display: none;">
                            <div class="file-input-wrapper">
                                <input type="file" class="attachment-file-input" multiple>
                                <label class="file-input-label">
                                    <i class="fas fa-cloud-upload-alt"></i> Choose files
                                </label>
                            </div>
                            <div class="upload-progress">Uploading...</div>
                            <div class="attachment-form-buttons">
                                <button class="attachment-form-btn cancel">Cancel</button>
                                <button class="attachment-form-btn save">Upload Files</button>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <button class="add-attachment-btn" style="margin-top: 10px; padding: 5px 10px; background: #f8f9fa; border: 1px dashed #ccc; border-radius: 4px; width: 100%; cursor: pointer;">
                            <i class="fas fa-plus"></i> Add Attachment
                        </button>
                    </div>
                </li>
            `;
        }

        // Get progress color
        function getProgressColor(percentage) {
            if (percentage >= 80) return '#27ae60';
            if (percentage >= 40) return '#f39c12';
            return '#e74c3c';
        }

        // Format date for display
        function formatDate(dateString) {
            if (!dateString) return '';
            const date = new Date(dateString);
            return date.toLocaleDateString('en-US', { year: 'numeric', month: 'short', day: 'numeric' });
        }

        // Format month and year
        function formatMonthYear(date) {
            const month = monthNames[date.getMonth()];
            const year = date.getFullYear();
            return `${month} ${year}`;
        }

        // Parse month and year string
        function parseMonthYear(monthYearStr) {
            const parts = monthYearStr.split(' ');
            if (parts.length !== 2) return null;
            
            const month = monthNames.indexOf(parts[0]);
            const year = parseInt(parts[1]);
            
            if (month === -1 || isNaN(year)) return null;
            
            return new Date(year, month, 1);
        }

        // Format file size
        function formatFileSize(bytes) {
            if (bytes === 0) return '0 Bytes';
            const k = 1024;
            const sizes = ['Bytes', 'KB', 'MB', 'GB'];
            const i = Math.floor(Math.log(bytes) / Math.log(k));
            return parseFloat((bytes / Math.pow(k, i)).toFixed(2)) + ' ' + sizes[i];
        }

        // Update stats
        function updateStats() {
            const totalObjectives = objectivesData.length;
            
            let completedTasks = 0;
            let totalTasks = 0;
            let totalAttachments = 0;
            
            objectivesData.forEach(objective => {
                const allTasks = [...objective.actionPoints, ...objective.kpis];
                totalTasks += allTasks.length;
                completedTasks += allTasks.filter(task => task.completed).length;
                
                // Count attachments
                allTasks.forEach(task => {
                    if (task.attachments) {
                        totalAttachments += task.attachments.length;
                    }
                });
            });
            
            const overallProgress = totalTasks > 0 ? Math.round((completedTasks / totalTasks) * 100) : 0;
            
            document.getElementById('total-objectives').textContent = totalObjectives;
            document.getElementById('completed-tasks').textContent = completedTasks;
            document.getElementById('overall-progress').textContent = `${overallProgress}%`;
            document.getElementById('total-attachments').textContent = totalAttachments;
        }

        // Add new objective
        function addNewObjective() {
            // Generate new ID (highest existing ID + 1)
            const maxId = objectivesData.reduce((max, obj) => Math.max(max, obj.id), 0);
            const newId = maxId + 1;
            
            // Create new objective
            const newObjective = {
                id: newId,
                title: "New Objective",
                status: "not-started",
                progress: 0,
                actionPoints: [
                    {text: "New action point 1", completed: false, notes: [], attachments: []},
                    {text: "New action point 2", completed: false, notes: [], attachments: []},
                    {text: "New action point 3", completed: false, notes: [], attachments: []}
                ],
                kpis: [
                    {text: "New KPI 1", completed: false, notes: [], attachments: []},
                    {text: "New KPI 2", completed: false, notes: [], attachments: []},
                    {text: "New KPI 3", completed: false, notes: [], attachments: []}
                ]
            };
            
            // Add to data array
            objectivesData.push(newObjective);
            
            // Re-render objectives
            renderObjectives();
            
            // Update stats
            updateStats();
            
            // Save to storage
            saveDashboard();
            
            // Show notification
            showNotification('New objective added successfully!');
            
            // Scroll to the new objective
            setTimeout(() => {
                const newCard = document.querySelector(`[data-objective-id="${newId}"]`);
                if (newCard) {
                    newCard.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'nearest' });
                    
                    // Automatically enter edit mode for the new objective
                    const editBtn = newCard.querySelector('.objective-edit-btn');
                    if (editBtn) {
                        editBtn.click();
                        
                        // Focus on the title input
                        setTimeout(() => {
                            const titleInput = newCard.querySelector('.objective-title-input');
                            if (titleInput) {
                                titleInput.focus();
                                titleInput.select();
                            }
                        }, 100);
                    }
                }
            }, 100);
        }

        // Update objective status based on progress
        function updateObjectiveStatus(objective) {
            const allTasks = [...objective.actionPoints, ...objective.kpis];
            const completedTasks = allTasks.filter(task => task.completed).length;
            objective.progress = allTasks.length > 0 ? Math.round((completedTasks / allTasks.length) * 100) : 0;
            
            // Update status based on progress
            if (objective.progress === 0) {
                objective.status = 'not-started';
            } else if (objective.progress === 100) {
                objective.status = 'completed';
            } else {
                objective.status = 'in-progress';
            }
            
            return objective.status;
        }

        // Delete an objective
        function deleteObjective(objectiveId) {
            // Find index of objective to delete
            const index = objectivesData.findIndex(obj => obj.id === objectiveId);
            
            if (index !== -1) {
                // Remove from array
                objectivesData.splice(index, 1);
                
                // Re-render
                renderObjectives();
                updateStats();
                saveDashboard();
                
                showNotification('Objective deleted successfully');
            }
        }

        // Update view
        function updateView() {
            const container = document.getElementById('objectives-container');
            container.className = `objectives-container ${currentView}-view`;
        }

        // Check reminders
        function checkReminders() {
            const now = new Date();
            const reminderNotification = document.getElementById('reminder-notification');
            const reminderContent = document.getElementById('reminder-content');
            
            // Clear previous content
            reminderContent.innerHTML = '';
            
            let hasReminders = false;
            let reminderHTML = '<ul class="reminder-list">';
            
            // Check each objective for tasks due soon
            objectivesData.forEach(objective => {
                if (objective.status === 'completed' || objective.progress === 100) return;

                const allTasks = [...objective.actionPoints, ...objective.kpis];
                
                allTasks.forEach(task => {
                    if (task.completed) return;

                    // Check if task has notes with due dates
                    task.notes.forEach(note => {
                        const noteReminderDate = note.dueDate || note.date;
                            if (noteReminderDate) {
                            const dueDate = new Date(noteReminderDate);
                            const daysUntilDue = Math.ceil((dueDate - now) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
                            
                            if (daysUntilDue >= 0 && daysUntilDue <= 7) {
                                hasReminders = true;
                                const statusClass = daysUntilDue <= 3 ? 'task-due-soon' : '';
                                const urgencyText = daysUntilDue <= 3 ? ' (Due soon!)' : daysUntilDue <= 7 ? ' (Due this week)' : '';
                                
                                reminderHTML += `
                                    <li class="reminder-item ${statusClass}">
                                        <strong>Objective ${objective.id}:</strong> ${task.text.substring(0, 50)}...
                                        <br>
                                        <small>Due: ${formatDate(noteReminderDate)}${urgencyText}</small>
                                    </li>
                                `;
                            }
                        }
                    });
                });
            });
            
            reminderHTML += '</ul>';
            
            if (hasReminders) {
                reminderContent.innerHTML = reminderHTML;
                reminderNotification.classList.add('show');
            } else {
                reminderContent.innerHTML = '<p>No upcoming reminders.</p>';
                reminderNotification.classList.remove('show');
            }
        }



        // Show due notes pop-up immediately after sign-in
        function showDueNotesOnSignIn() {
            const modal = document.getElementById('due-notes-modal');
            const content = document.getElementById('due-notes-content');
            if (!modal || !content) return;

            const today = new Date();
            today.setHours(23, 59, 59, 999);
            const dueNotes = [];

            objectivesData.forEach(objective => {
                if (objective.status === 'completed' || objective.progress === 100) return;

                const actionPoints = Array.isArray(objective.actionPoints) ? objective.actionPoints : [];
                const kpis = Array.isArray(objective.kpis) ? objective.kpis : [];
                const allTasks = [...actionPoints, ...kpis];

                allTasks.forEach(task => {
                    if (task.completed) return;

                    const notes = Array.isArray(task.notes) ? task.notes : [];
                    notes.forEach(note => {
                        if (note && (note.dueDate || note.date)) {
                            const noteReminderDate = note.dueDate || note.date;
                            const dueDate = new Date(noteReminderDate);
                            dueDate.setHours(23, 59, 59, 999);

                            if (dueDate <= today) {
                                const diffDays = Math.ceil((dueDate - today) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
                                dueNotes.push({
                                    objectiveId: objective.id,
                                    objectiveTitle: objective.title || 'Untitled Objective',
                                    taskText: task.text || 'Untitled Task',
                                    noteText: note.text || 'No note details provided',
                                    dueDate: noteReminderDate,
                                    isOverdue: dueDate < today,
                                    daysOverdue: Math.abs(diffDays)
                                });
                            }
                        }
                    });
                });
            });

            dueNotes.sort((a, b) => new Date(a.dueDate) - new Date(b.dueDate));

            if (dueNotes.length === 0) {
                content.innerHTML = `
                    <div class="due-notes-empty">
                        <i class="fas fa-check-circle"></i>
                        <h4>No due notes at the moment</h4>
                        <p>You are currently on track.</p>
                    </div>
                `;
            } else {
                const overdueCount = dueNotes.filter(item => item.isOverdue).length;
                const dueTodayCount = dueNotes.length - overdueCount;

                content.innerHTML = `
                    <div class="due-notes-summary">
                        ${dueNotes.length} due note${dueNotes.length === 1 ? '' : 's'} found after sign-in
                        ${overdueCount ? ` - ${overdueCount} overdue` : ''}
                        ${dueTodayCount ? ` - ${dueTodayCount} due today` : ''}
                    </div>
                    <div class="due-notes-list">
                        ${dueNotes.map(item => `
                            <div class="due-note-card ${item.isOverdue ? 'overdue' : ''}">
                                <div class="due-note-header">
                                    <div class="due-note-title">Objective ${item.objectiveId}: ${item.objectiveTitle}</div>
                                    <span class="due-note-badge ${item.isOverdue ? 'overdue' : ''}">
                                        ${item.isOverdue ? 'Overdue' : 'Due Today'}
                                    </span>
                                </div>
                                <div class="due-note-meta">
                                    <strong>Task:</strong> ${escapeHTML(item.taskText)}<br>
                                    <strong>Due:</strong> ${formatDate(item.dueDate)}
                                </div>
                                <div class="due-note-text"><strong>Note:</strong> ${escapeHTML(item.noteText)}</div>
                            </div>
                        `).join('')}
                    </div>
                `;
            }

            modal.classList.add('show');
        }

        // Show reminders modal
        function showRemindersModal() {
            const modal = document.getElementById('reminders-modal');
            const container = document.getElementById('reminders-list-container');
            
            let remindersHTML = '';
            
            objectivesData.forEach(objective => {
                if (objective.status === 'completed' || objective.progress === 100) return;

                const allTasks = [...objective.actionPoints, ...objective.kpis];
                let hasTasks = false;
                let tasksHTML = '';
                
                allTasks.forEach(task => {
                    if (task.completed) return;

                    if (task.notes && task.notes.length > 0) {
                        task.notes.forEach(note => {
                            const noteReminderDate = note.dueDate || note.date;
                            if (noteReminderDate) {
                                hasTasks = true;
                                const dueDate = new Date(noteReminderDate);
                                const now = new Date();
                                const daysUntilDue = Math.ceil((dueDate - now) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
                                
                                tasksHTML += `
                                    <div class="reminder-item ${daysUntilDue <= 3 ? 'task-overdue' : daysUntilDue <= 7 ? 'task-due-soon' : ''}">
                                        <strong>${task.text.substring(0, 60)}...</strong>
                                        <div>Due: ${formatDate(noteReminderDate)} (${daysUntilDue} days)</div>
                                        <div>Note: ${note.text.substring(0, 80)}...</div>
                                    </div>
                                `;
                            }
                        });
                    }
                });
                
                if (hasTasks) {
                    remindersHTML += `
                        <div style="margin-bottom: 20px;">
                            <h4>Objective ${objective.id}: ${objective.title.substring(0, 50)}...</h4>
                            ${tasksHTML}
                        </div>
                    `;
                }
            });
            
            if (remindersHTML === '') {
                remindersHTML = '<p>No reminders found.</p>';
            }
            
            container.innerHTML = remindersHTML;
            modal.classList.add('show');
        }

        // Setup dashboard event listeners
        function setupDashboardEventListeners() {
            // Filter buttons
            document.querySelectorAll('.filter-btn').forEach(btn => {
                btn.addEventListener('click', function() {
                    document.querySelectorAll('.filter-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
                    this.classList.add('active');
                    currentFilter = this.dataset.filter;
                    renderObjectives();
                });
            });
            
            // View buttons
            document.querySelectorAll('.view-btn').forEach(btn => {
                btn.addEventListener('click', function() {
                    document.querySelectorAll('.view-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
                    this.classList.add('active');
                    currentView = this.dataset.view;
                    updateView();
                });
            });
            
            // Save progress button
            document.getElementById('save-progress').addEventListener('click', saveDashboard);
            
            // Add new objective button
            document.getElementById('add-objective').addEventListener('click', addNewObjective);
            
            // Edit period button
            document.getElementById('edit-period-btn').addEventListener('click', function() {
                document.querySelector('.date-info-text').style.display = 'none';
                document.getElementById('date-range-inputs').style.display = 'flex';
                
                // Set current values in inputs
                const startDate = parseMonthYear(reviewPeriod.start);
                const endDate = parseMonthYear(reviewPeriod.end);
                
                document.getElementById('period-start').value = startDate ? 
                    `${String(startDate.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0')}/${startDate.getFullYear()}` : '';
                document.getElementById('period-end').value = endDate ? 
                    `${String(endDate.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0')}/${endDate.getFullYear()}` : '';
            });
            
            // Save period button
            document.getElementById('save-period-btn').addEventListener('click', savePeriod);
            
            // Cancel period button
            document.getElementById('cancel-period-btn').addEventListener('click', function() {
                document.querySelector('.date-info-text').style.display = 'flex';
                document.getElementById('date-range-inputs').style.display = 'none';
            });
            
            // Calendar icons
            document.getElementById('calendar-start-icon').addEventListener('click', function() {
                showCalendar('start');
            });
            
            document.getElementById('calendar-end-icon').addEventListener('click', function() {
                showCalendar('end');
            });
            
            // Calendar navigation
            document.getElementById('calendar-prev').addEventListener('click', function() {
                calendarState.currentMonth--;
                if (calendarState.currentMonth < 0) {
                    calendarState.currentMonth = 11;
                    calendarState.currentYear--;
                }
                renderCalendar();
            });
            
            document.getElementById('calendar-next').addEventListener('click', function() {
                calendarState.currentMonth++;
                if (calendarState.currentMonth > 11) {
                    calendarState.currentMonth = 0;
                    calendarState.currentYear++;
                }
                renderCalendar();
            });
            
            // Calendar close
            document.getElementById('calendar-close').addEventListener('click', function() {
                document.getElementById('calendar-modal').style.display = 'none';
            });
            
            // Calendar select
            document.getElementById('calendar-select-btn').addEventListener('click', function() {
                if (calendarState.selectedDate && calendarState.inputTarget) {
                    const month = calendarState.selectedDate.getMonth();
                    const year = calendarState.selectedDate.getFullYear();
                    
                    const formattedDate = `${String(month + 1).padStart(2, '0')}/${year}`;
                    
                    if (calendarState.inputTarget === 'start') {
                        document.getElementById('period-start').value = formattedDate;
                    } else {
                        document.getElementById('period-end').value = formattedDate;
                    }
                    
                    document.getElementById('calendar-modal').style.display = 'none';
                }
            });
            
            // Preset period buttons
            document.querySelectorAll('.preset-btn').forEach(btn => {
                btn.addEventListener('click', function() {
                    const period = this.dataset.period;
                    applyPresetPeriod(period);
                });
            });
            
            // PDF button
            document.getElementById('generate-pdf').addEventListener('click', function() {
                document.getElementById('pdf-modal').classList.add('show');
            });
            
            // PDF modal buttons
            document.getElementById('cancel-pdf').addEventListener('click', function() {
                document.getElementById('pdf-modal').classList.remove('show');
            });
            
            document.getElementById('generate-pdf-now').addEventListener('click', function() {
                document.getElementById('pdf-modal').classList.remove('show');
                generatePDF();
            });
            
            // Show reminders button
            document.getElementById('show-reminders').addEventListener('click', function() {
                showRemindersModal();
            });
            
            // Dismiss reminders button
            document.getElementById('dismiss-reminders').addEventListener('click', function() {
                document.getElementById('reminder-notification').classList.remove('show');
            });
            
            // Close reminders modal
            document.getElementById('close-reminders').addEventListener('click', function() {
                document.getElementById('reminders-modal').classList.remove('show');
            });

            // Close sign-in due notes modal
            const closeDueNotesBtn = document.getElementById('close-due-notes');
            if (closeDueNotesBtn) {
                closeDueNotesBtn.addEventListener('click', function() {
                    document.getElementById('due-notes-modal').classList.remove('show');
                });
            }
            
            // Close file preview modal
            document.getElementById('close-file-preview').addEventListener('click', function() {
                document.getElementById('file-preview-modal').classList.remove('show');
            });
            
            // Delete objective modal buttons
            document.getElementById('cancel-delete-objective').addEventListener('click', function() {
                document.getElementById('delete-objective-modal').classList.remove('show');
                objectiveToDelete = null;
            });
            
            document.getElementById('confirm-delete-objective').addEventListener('click', function() {
                if (objectiveToDelete) {
                    deleteObjective(objectiveToDelete);
                    objectiveToDelete = null;
                }
                document.getElementById('delete-objective-modal').classList.remove('show');
            });
            
            // Reset button
            document.getElementById('reset-progress').addEventListener('click', function() {
                if (confirm('Are you sure you want to reset all progress? This will also delete all attachments and notes.')) {
                    // Reset to empty state
                    objectivesData = [];
                    
                    renderObjectives();
                    updateStats();
                    saveDashboard();
                    showNotification('All progress has been reset');
                }
            });
            
            // User menu
            document.getElementById('user-menu-btn').addEventListener('click', function(e) {
                e.stopPropagation();
                document.getElementById('user-dropdown').classList.toggle('show');
            });
            
            // Logout button in dropdown
            document.getElementById('logout-btn').addEventListener('click', function(e) {
                e.preventDefault();
                signOut();
            });
            
            // Sign Out Button (in controls section)
            document.getElementById('sign-out-btn').addEventListener('click', function(e) {
                e.preventDefault();
                signOut();
            });
            
            // Close dropdown when clicking outside
            document.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
                if (!e.target.closest('.user-menu')) {
                    document.getElementById('user-dropdown').classList.remove('show');
                }
            });
            
            // Event delegation for dynamic elements
            setupDynamicEventListeners();
        }

        // Setup dynamic event listeners
        function setupDynamicEventListeners() {
            document.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
                // Handle checkbox changes
                if (e.target.classList.contains('task-checkbox')) {
                    handleTaskCheckboxChange(e);
                }
                
                // Handle edit task button
                if (e.target.closest('.edit-task-btn')) {
                    handleEditTask(e);
                }
                
                // Handle save task button
                if (e.target.closest('.save-task-btn')) {
                    handleSaveTask(e);
                }
                
                // Handle delete task button
                if (e.target.closest('.delete-task-btn')) {
                    handleDeleteTask(e);
                }
                
                // Handle add task button
                if (e.target.closest('.add-task-btn')) {
                    handleAddTask(e);
                }
                
                // Handle note button
                if (e.target.closest('.note-btn')) {
                    handleNoteButton(e);
                }
                
                // Handle attachment button
                if (e.target.closest('.attachment-btn')) {
                    handleAttachmentButton(e);
                }
                
                // Handle add note button
                if (e.target.closest('.add-note-btn')) {
                    handleAddNoteButton(e);
                }
                
                // Handle add attachment button
                if (e.target.closest('.add-attachment-btn')) {
                    handleAddAttachmentButton(e);
                }
                
                // Handle save note button
                if (e.target.closest('.note-form-btn.save')) {
                    handleSaveNote(e);
                }
                
                // Handle cancel note button
                if (e.target.closest('.note-form-btn.cancel')) {
                    handleCancelNote(e);
                }
                
                // Handle edit note button
                if (e.target.closest('.edit-note-btn')) {
                    handleEditNote(e);
                }

                // Handle delete note button
                if (e.target.closest('.delete-note-btn')) {
                    handleDeleteNote(e);
                }
                
                // Handle save attachment button
                if (e.target.closest('.attachment-form-btn.save')) {
                    handleSaveAttachment(e);
                }
                
                // Handle cancel attachment button
                if (e.target.closest('.attachment-form-btn.cancel')) {
                    handleCancelAttachment(e);
                }
                
                // Handle delete attachment button
                if (e.target.closest('.delete-attachment-btn')) {
                    handleDeleteAttachment(e);
                }
                
                // Handle view attachment button
                if (e.target.closest('.view-attachment-btn')) {
                    handleViewAttachment(e);
                }
                
                // Handle progress slider
                if (e.target.classList.contains('progress-slider')) {
                    handleProgressSlider(e);
                }
                
                // Handle progress number input
                if (e.target.classList.contains('progress-number')) {
                    handleProgressNumber(e);
                }
                
                // Handle edit objective button
                if (e.target.closest('.objective-edit-btn')) {
                    handleEditObjective(e);
                }
                
                // Handle save objective button
                if (e.target.closest('.objective-save-btn')) {
                    handleSaveObjective(e);
                }
                
                // Handle cancel edit button
                if (e.target.closest('.objective-cancel-btn')) {
                    handleCancelObjectiveEdit(e);
                }
                
                // Handle delete objective button
                if (e.target.closest('.objective-delete-btn')) {
                    handleDeleteObjective(e);
                }
            });
            
            // Handle input events for progress
            document.addEventListener('input', function(e) {
                if (e.target.classList.contains('progress-slider')) {
                    const progressNumber = e.target.closest('.progress-input-container').querySelector('.progress-number');
                    if (progressNumber) {
                        progressNumber.value = e.target.value;
                    }
                }
                
                if (e.target.classList.contains('progress-number')) {
                    const progressSlider = e.target.closest('.progress-input-container').querySelector('.progress-slider');
                    if (progressSlider) {
                        progressSlider.value = e.target.value;
                    }
                }
            });
        }

        // Individual handler functions
        let objectiveToDelete = null;

        function handleTaskCheckboxChange(e) {
            const objectiveId = parseInt(e.target.getAttribute('data-objective-id'));
            const taskIndex = parseInt(e.target.getAttribute('data-task-index'));
            const taskType = e.target.getAttribute('data-task-type');
            
            const objective = objectivesData.find(obj => obj.id === objectiveId);
            if (objective) {
                const taskList = taskType === 'action' ? objective.actionPoints : objective.kpis;
                if (taskList[taskIndex]) {
                    taskList[taskIndex].completed = e.target.checked;
                    
                    // Update task styling
                    const taskItem = e.target.closest('.task-item');
                    if (taskItem) {
                        if (e.target.checked) {
                            taskItem.classList.add('completed');
                        } else {
                            taskItem.classList.remove('completed');
                        }
                    }
                    
                    // Update objective progress and status
                    updateObjectiveStatus(objective);
                    
                    // Update the progress bar
                    const card = e.target.closest('.objective-card');
                    const progressFill = card.querySelector('.progress-fill');
                    const progressValue = card.querySelector('.progress-value');
                    const progressSlider = card.querySelector('.progress-slider');
                    const progressNumber = card.querySelector('.progress-number');
                    
                    if (progressFill) {
                        progressFill.style.width = `${objective.progress}%`;
                        progressFill.style.backgroundColor = getProgressColor(objective.progress);
                    }
                    if (progressValue) progressValue.textContent = `${objective.progress}%`;
                    if (progressSlider) progressSlider.value = objective.progress;
                    if (progressNumber) progressNumber.value = objective.progress;
                    
                    // Update status badge
                    const statusBadge = card.querySelector('.status-badge');
                    const statusSelect = card.querySelector('.status-select');
                    if (statusBadge) {
                        let statusText = '';
                        let statusClass = '';
                        switch(objective.status) {
                            case 'not-started': 
                                statusText = 'Not Started'; 
                                statusClass = 'status-not-started';
                                break;
                            case 'in-progress': 
                                statusText = 'In Progress'; 
                                statusClass = 'status-in-progress';
                                break;
                            case 'completed': 
                                statusText = 'Completed'; 
                                statusClass = 'status-completed';
                                break;
                        }
                        statusBadge.textContent = statusText;
                        statusBadge.className = `status-badge ${statusClass}`;
                    }
                    if (statusSelect) statusSelect.value = objective.status;
                    
                    updateStats();
                    saveDashboard();
                }
            }
        }

        function handleEditTask(e) {
            const taskItem = e.target.closest('.task-item');
            const taskText = taskItem.querySelector('.task-text');
            const taskInput = taskItem.querySelector('.task-text-input');
            
            if (taskText && taskInput) {
                taskText.style.display = 'none';
                taskInput.style.display = 'block';
                taskInput.focus();
                taskInput.select();
                
                // Change edit icon to save
                const editBtn = e.target.closest('.edit-task-btn');
                editBtn.innerHTML = '<i class="fas fa-check"></i>';
                editBtn.title = 'Save Task';
                editBtn.classList.remove('edit-task-btn');
                editBtn.classList.add('save-task-btn');
            }
        }

        function handleSaveTask(e) {
            const taskItem = e.target.closest('.task-item');
            const taskText = taskItem.querySelector('.task-text');
            const taskInput = taskItem.querySelector('.task-text-input');
            const objectiveId = parseInt(taskItem.closest('.objective-card').getAttribute('data-objective-id'));
            
            if (taskText && taskInput && taskInput.value.trim()) {
                const objective = objectivesData.find(obj => obj.id === objectiveId);
                if (objective) {
                    // Find which task list and index
                    const taskListContainer = taskItem.closest('.task-list');
                    const isAction = taskListContainer.id.startsWith('action-list');
                    const taskIndex = Array.from(taskListContainer.children).indexOf(taskItem);
                    
                    const taskList = isAction ? objective.actionPoints : objective.kpis;
                    if (taskList[taskIndex]) {
                        taskList[taskIndex].text = taskInput.value.trim();
                        taskText.textContent = taskInput.value.trim();
                    }
                }
                
                taskText.style.display = 'flex';
                taskInput.style.display = 'none';
                
                // Change save icon back to edit
                const saveBtn = e.target.closest('.save-task-btn');
                saveBtn.innerHTML = '<i class="fas fa-edit"></i>';
                saveBtn.title = 'Edit Task';
                saveBtn.classList.remove('save-task-btn');
                saveBtn.classList.add('edit-task-btn');
                
                saveDashboard();
                showNotification('Task updated');
            }
        }

        function handleDeleteTask(e) {
            const taskItem = e.target.closest('.task-item');
            const objectiveId = parseInt(taskItem.closest('.objective-card').getAttribute('data-objective-id'));
            
            if (confirm('Are you sure you want to delete this task?')) {
                const objective = objectivesData.find(obj => obj.id === objectiveId);
                if (objective) {
                    const taskListContainer = taskItem.closest('.task-list');
                    const isAction = taskListContainer.id.startsWith('action-list');
                    const taskIndex = Array.from(taskListContainer.children).indexOf(taskItem);
                    
                    const taskList = isAction ? objective.actionPoints : objective.kpis;
                    if (taskList[taskIndex]) {
                        taskList.splice(taskIndex, 1);
                        
                        // Update objective progress and status
                        updateObjectiveStatus(objective);
                        
                        // Re-render the objective
                        const card = taskItem.closest('.objective-card');
                        const newCard = createObjectiveCard(objective);
                        card.parentNode.replaceChild(newCard, card);
                        
                        updateStats();
                        saveDashboard();
                        showNotification('Task deleted');
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        function handleAddTask(e) {
            const btn = e.target.closest('.add-task-btn');
            const objectiveId = parseInt(btn.getAttribute('data-objective-id'));
            const taskType = btn.getAttribute('data-type');
            
            const objective = objectivesData.find(obj => obj.id === objectiveId);
            if (objective) {
                const taskList = taskType === 'action' ? objective.actionPoints : objective.kpis;
                const newTask = {
                    text: `New ${taskType === 'action' ? 'action point' : 'KPI'}`,
                    completed: false,
                    notes: [],
                    attachments: []
                };
                
                taskList.push(newTask);
                
                // Update objective progress and status
                updateObjectiveStatus(objective);
                
                // Re-render the objective
                const card = btn.closest('.objective-card');
                const newCard = createObjectiveCard(objective);
                card.parentNode.replaceChild(newCard, card);
                
                updateStats();
                saveDashboard();
                showNotification('New task added');
            }
        }
