        function handleSaveNote(e) {
            const btn = e.target.closest('.note-form-btn.save');
            const taskItem = btn.closest('.task-item');
            const addNoteForm = taskItem.querySelector('.add-note-form');
            const noteDateInput = taskItem.querySelector('.note-date-input');
            const noteTextInput = taskItem.querySelector('.note-text-input');
            const objectiveId = parseInt(taskItem.closest('.objective-card').getAttribute('data-objective-id'));
            const editNoteIndexRaw = addNoteForm.getAttribute('data-edit-note-index');
            const editNoteIndex = editNoteIndexRaw !== null ? parseInt(editNoteIndexRaw) : null;

            if (noteDateInput.value && noteTextInput.value.trim()) {
                const objective = objectivesData.find(obj => obj.id === objectiveId);
                if (objective) {
                    const taskListContainer = taskItem.closest('.task-list');
                    const isAction = taskListContainer.id.startsWith('action-list');
                    const taskIndex = Array.from(taskListContainer.children).indexOf(taskItem);

                    const taskList = isAction ? objective.actionPoints : objective.kpis;
                    if (taskList[taskIndex]) {
                        if (!taskList[taskIndex].notes) taskList[taskIndex].notes = [];
                        const noteData = {
                            date: noteDateInput.value,
                            dueDate: noteDateInput.value,
                            text: noteTextInput.value.trim(),
                            reminderEnabled: true
                        };

                        if (editNoteIndex !== null && taskList[taskIndex].notes[editNoteIndex]) {
                            taskList[taskIndex].notes[editNoteIndex] = noteData;
                        } else {
                            taskList[taskIndex].notes.push(noteData);
                        }

                        const newTaskHTML = createTaskHTML(taskList[taskIndex], taskIndex, isAction ? 'action' : 'kpi', objectiveId);
                        taskItem.outerHTML = newTaskHTML;

                        saveDashboard();
                        showNotification(editNoteIndex !== null ? 'Note reminder updated' : 'Note reminder added');
                        checkReminders();
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        function handleEditNote(e) {
            const btn = e.target.closest('.edit-note-btn');
            const objectiveId = parseInt(btn.getAttribute('data-objective-id'));
            const taskIndex = parseInt(btn.getAttribute('data-task-index'));
            const taskType = btn.getAttribute('data-task-type');
            const noteIndex = parseInt(btn.getAttribute('data-note-index'));
            const objective = objectivesData.find(obj => obj.id === objectiveId);

            if (objective) {
                const taskList = taskType === 'action' ? objective.actionPoints : objective.kpis;
                const note = taskList[taskIndex] && taskList[taskIndex].notes ? taskList[taskIndex].notes[noteIndex] : null;
                if (note) {
                    const taskItem = btn.closest('.task-item');
                    const notesSection = taskItem.querySelector('.task-notes-section');
                    const addNoteForm = taskItem.querySelector('.add-note-form');
                    const addNoteBtn = taskItem.querySelector('.add-note-btn');
                    const noteDateInput = taskItem.querySelector('.note-date-input');
                    const noteTextInput = taskItem.querySelector('.note-text-input');
                    const saveBtn = addNoteForm.querySelector('.note-form-btn.save');

                    notesSection.style.display = 'block';
                    addNoteForm.style.display = 'block';
                    addNoteBtn.style.display = 'none';
                    addNoteForm.setAttribute('data-edit-note-index', noteIndex);
                    noteDateInput.value = note.dueDate || note.date || new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0];
                    noteTextInput.value = note.text || '';
                    if (saveBtn) saveBtn.textContent = 'Update Note';
                    noteTextInput.focus();
                }
            }
        }

        function handleCancelNote(e) {
            const btn = e.target.closest('.note-form-btn.cancel');
            const taskItem = btn.closest('.task-item');
            const addNoteForm = taskItem.querySelector('.add-note-form');
            const addNoteBtn = taskItem.querySelector('.add-note-btn');

        function handleDeleteNote(e) {
            const btn = e.target.closest('.delete-note-btn');
            const objectiveId = parseInt(btn.getAttribute('data-objective-id'));
            const taskIndex = parseInt(btn.getAttribute('data-task-index'));
            const taskType = btn.getAttribute('data-task-type');
            const noteIndex = parseInt(btn.getAttribute('data-note-index'));
            
            const objective = objectivesData.find(obj => obj.id === objectiveId);
            if (objective) {
                const taskList = taskType === 'action' ? objective.actionPoints : objective.kpis;
                if (taskList[taskIndex] && taskList[taskIndex].notes[noteIndex]) {
                    taskList[taskIndex].notes.splice(noteIndex, 1);
                    
                    // Re-render the task
                    const taskItem = btn.closest('.task-item');
                    const taskListElement = taskItem.closest('.task-list');
                    const newTaskHTML = createTaskHTML(taskList[taskIndex], taskIndex, taskType, objectiveId);
                    taskItem.outerHTML = newTaskHTML;
                    
                    saveDashboard();
                    showNotification('Note deleted');

        }

        function handleSaveAttachment(e) {
            const btn = e.target.closest('.attachment-form-btn.save');
            const taskItem = btn.closest('.task-item');
            const fileInput = taskItem.querySelector('.attachment-file-input');
            const objectiveId = parseInt(taskItem.closest('.objective-card').getAttribute('data-objective-id'));
            
            if (fileInput.files.length > 0) {
                const uploadProgress = taskItem.querySelector('.upload-progress');
                const maxAttachmentBytes = 350 * 1024;
                const maxBatchBytes = 700 * 1024;
                const files = Array.from(fileInput.files);
                const oversizedFiles = files.filter(file => file.size > maxAttachmentBytes);
                const totalBytes = files.reduce((sum, file) => sum + file.size, 0);

                if (oversizedFiles.length) {
                    uploadProgress.classList.remove('active');
                    showNotification(`Attachment too large. Keep each evidence file under 350 KB until Firebase Storage is enabled.`);
                    return;
                }

                if (totalBytes > maxBatchBytes) {
                    uploadProgress.classList.remove('active');
                    showNotification('Too many attachments at once. Keep each upload batch under 700 KB until Firebase Storage is enabled.');
                    return;
                }

                uploadProgress.classList.add('active');
                uploadProgress.textContent = `Uploading ${fileInput.files.length} file(s)...`;
                
                // Process each file
                const processedFiles = [];
                
                files.forEach((file, index) => {
                    const reader = new FileReader();
                    reader.onload = function(e) {
                        processedFiles.push({
                            name: file.name,
                            size: file.size,
                            type: file.type,
                            data: e.target.result
                        });
                        
                        // When all files are processed
                        if (processedFiles.length === files.length) {
                            const objective = objectivesData.find(obj => obj.id === objectiveId);
                            if (objective) {
                                const taskListContainer = taskItem.closest('.task-list');
                                const isAction = taskListContainer.id.startsWith('action-list');
                                const taskIndex = Array.from(taskListContainer.children).indexOf(taskItem);
                                
                                const taskList = isAction ? objective.actionPoints : objective.kpis;
                                if (taskList[taskIndex]) {
                                    if (!taskList[taskIndex].attachments) taskList[taskIndex].attachments = [];
                                    taskList[taskIndex].attachments.push(...processedFiles);
                                    
                                    // Re-render the task
                                    const taskListElement = taskItem.closest('.task-list');
                                    const newTaskHTML = createTaskHTML(taskList[taskIndex], taskIndex, isAction ? 'action' : 'kpi', objectiveId);
                                    taskItem.outerHTML = newTaskHTML;
                                    
                                    updateStats();
                                    saveDashboard();
                                    showNotification(`${files.length} file(s) uploaded`);
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    };
                    reader.readAsDataURL(file);
                });
            }
        }

        function handleCancelAttachment(e) {
            const btn = e.target.closest('.attachment-form-btn.cancel');
            const taskItem = btn.closest('.task-item');
            const addAttachmentForm = taskItem.querySelector('.add-attachment-form');
            const addAttachmentBtn = taskItem.querySelector('.add-attachment-btn');
            
            addAttachmentForm.style.display = 'none';
            addAttachmentBtn.style.display = 'block';
        }

        function handleDeleteAttachment(e) {
            const btn = e.target.closest('.delete-attachment-btn');
            const objectiveId = parseInt(btn.getAttribute('data-objective-id'));
            const taskIndex = parseInt(btn.getAttribute('data-task-index'));
            const taskType = btn.getAttribute('data-task-type');
            const attachmentIndex = parseInt(btn.getAttribute('data-attachment-index'));
            
            const objective = objectivesData.find(obj => obj.id === objectiveId);
            if (objective) {
                const taskList = taskType === 'action' ? objective.actionPoints : objective.kpis;
                if (taskList[taskIndex] && taskList[taskIndex].attachments[attachmentIndex]) {
                    taskList[taskIndex].attachments.splice(attachmentIndex, 1);
                    
                    // Re-render the task
                    const taskItem = btn.closest('.task-item');
                    const taskListElement = taskItem.closest('.task-list');
                    const newTaskHTML = createTaskHTML(taskList[taskIndex], taskIndex, taskType, objectiveId);
                    taskItem.outerHTML = newTaskHTML;
                    
                    updateStats();
                    saveDashboard();
                    showNotification('Attachment deleted');
                }
            }
        }

        function handleViewAttachment(e) {
            const btn = e.target.closest('.view-attachment-btn');
            const fileData = btn.getAttribute('data-file');
            const fileName = btn.getAttribute('data-filename');
            
            const modal = document.getElementById('file-preview-modal');
            const container = document.getElementById('file-preview-container');
            const downloadBtn = document.getElementById('download-file-btn');
            
            container.innerHTML = '';
            
            // Check file type
            if (fileName.match(/\.(jpg|jpeg|png|gif)$/i)) {
                // Image file
                const img = document.createElement('img');
                img.src = fileData;
                img.className = 'file-preview';
                container.appendChild(img);
            } else if (fileName.match(/\.(pdf)$/i)) {
                // PDF file
                const embed = document.createElement('embed');
                embed.src = fileData;
                embed.type = 'application/pdf';
                embed.className = 'file-preview';
                container.appendChild(embed);
            } else if (fileName.match(/\.(txt)$/i)) {
                // Text file
                const textContent = atob(fileData.split(',')[1]);
                const pre = document.createElement('pre');
                pre.textContent = textContent;
                pre.style.whiteSpace = 'pre-wrap';
                pre.style.padding = '20px';
                container.appendChild(pre);
            } else if (fileName.match(/\.(html|htm)$/i)) {
                // HTML file preview
                const iframe = document.createElement('iframe');
                iframe.srcdoc = atob(fileData.split(',')[1]);
                iframe.className = 'file-preview';
                iframe.style.width = '100%';
                iframe.style.height = '60vh';
                iframe.style.border = '1px solid #e0e0e0';
                iframe.style.borderRadius = '8px';
                container.appendChild(iframe);
            } else {
                // Unsupported file type
                container.innerHTML = `
                    <div class="unsupported-file">
                        <i class="fas fa-file"></i>
                        <h4>File Preview Not Available</h4>
                        <p>Preview is not available for this file type.</p>
                        <div class="file-info">
                            <p>File: ${fileName}</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                `;
            }
            
            // Set up download
            downloadBtn.href = fileData;
            downloadBtn.download = fileName;
            
            modal.classList.add('show');
        }

        function handleProgressSlider(e) {
            const objectiveId = parseInt(e.target.closest('.objective-card').getAttribute('data-objective-id'));
            const progressNumber = e.target.closest('.progress-input-container').querySelector('.progress-number');
            const progressFill = e.target.closest('.progress-section').querySelector('.progress-fill');
            
            progressNumber.value = e.target.value;
            progressFill.style.width = `${e.target.value}%`;
            progressFill.style.backgroundColor = getProgressColor(parseInt(e.target.value));
            
            const objective = objectivesData.find(obj => obj.id === objectiveId);
            if (objective) {
                objective.progress = parseInt(e.target.value);
                objective.status = updateObjectiveStatus(objective);
                
                // Update status badge
                const card = e.target.closest('.objective-card');
                const statusBadge = card.querySelector('.status-badge');
                const statusSelect = card.querySelector('.status-select');
                if (statusBadge) {
                    let statusText = '';
                    let statusClass = '';
                    switch(objective.status) {
                        case 'not-started': 
                            statusText = 'Not Started'; 
                            statusClass = 'status-not-started';
                            break;
                        case 'in-progress': 
                            statusText = 'In Progress'; 
                            statusClass = 'status-in-progress';
                            break;
                        case 'completed': 
                            statusText = 'Completed'; 
                            statusClass = 'status-completed';
                            break;
                    }
                    statusBadge.textContent = statusText;
                    statusBadge.className = `status-badge ${statusClass}`;
                }
                if (statusSelect) statusSelect.value = objective.status;
                
                updateStats();
                saveDashboard();
            }
        }

        function handleProgressNumber(e) {
            const objectiveId = parseInt(e.target.closest('.objective-card').getAttribute('data-objective-id'));
            const progressSlider = e.target.closest('.progress-input-container').querySelector('.progress-slider');
            const progressFill = e.target.closest('.progress-section').querySelector('.progress-fill');
            
            let value = parseInt(e.target.value);
            if (isNaN(value)) value = 0;
            if (value < 0) value = 0;
            if (value > 100) value = 100;
            
            e.target.value = value;
            progressSlider.value = value;
            progressFill.style.width = `${value}%`;
            progressFill.style.backgroundColor = getProgressColor(value);
            
            const objective = objectivesData.find(obj => obj.id === objectiveId);
            if (objective) {

                objective.status = updateObjectiveStatus(objective);
                
                // Update status badge

                const statusBadge = card.querySelector('.status-badge');
                const statusSelect = card.querySelector('.status-select');
                if (statusBadge) {
                    let statusText = '';

                    switch(objective.status) {

                            statusText = 'Not Started'; 
                            statusClass = 'status-not-started';
                            break;
                        case 'in-progress': 
                            statusText = 'In Progress'; 
                            statusClass = 'status-in-progress';
                            break;
                        case 'completed': 
                            statusText = 'Completed'; 
                            statusClass = 'status-completed';
                            break;
                    }
                    statusBadge.textContent = statusText;
                    statusBadge.className = `status-badge ${statusClass}`;
                }
                if (statusSelect) statusSelect.value = objective.status;
                
                updateStats();
                saveDashboard();
            }
        }

            document.getElementById('delete-objective-modal').classList.add('show');

        // Calendar functions
        function showCalendar(target) {
            calendarState.inputTarget = target;
            
            // Position the calendar
            const modal = document.getElementById('calendar-modal');
            const input = document.getElementById(`period-${target}`);
            
            // Reset selected date
            calendarState.selectedDate = null;
            document.getElementById('selected-date-display').textContent = 'Select a date';
            
            // Show modal
            modal.style.display = 'block';
            
            // Position near the input
            const rect = input.getBoundingClientRect();
            modal.style.position = 'absolute';
            modal.style.left = `${rect.left}px`;
            modal.style.top = `${rect.bottom + 5}px`;
            
            // Render calendar
            renderCalendar();
        }

        function renderCalendar() {
            const monthYearElement = document.getElementById('calendar-month-year');
            const daysContainer = document.getElementById('calendar-days');
            
            // Update month/year display
            monthYearElement.textContent = `${monthNames[calendarState.currentMonth]} ${calendarState.currentYear}`;
            
            // Clear previous days
            daysContainer.innerHTML = '';
            
            // Get first day of month and total days
            const firstDay = new Date(calendarState.currentYear, calendarState.currentMonth, 1);
            const lastDay = new Date(calendarState.currentYear, calendarState.currentMonth + 1, 0);
            const totalDays = lastDay.getDate();
            const firstDayIndex = firstDay.getDay();
            
            // Previous month days
            const prevMonthLastDay = new Date(calendarState.currentYear, calendarState.currentMonth, 0).getDate();
            for (let i = firstDayIndex - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
                const day = document.createElement('div');
                day.className = 'calendar-day other-month';
                day.textContent = prevMonthLastDay - i;
                daysContainer.appendChild(day);
            }
            
            // Current month days
            const today = new Date();
            for (let i = 1; i <= totalDays; i++) {
                const day = document.createElement('div');
                day.className = 'calendar-day';
                day.textContent = i;
                
                // Check if today
                if (calendarState.currentYear === today.getFullYear() && 
                    calendarState.currentMonth === today.getMonth() && 
                    i === today.getDate()) {
                    day.classList.add('today');
                }
                
                daysContainer.appendChild(day);
            }
            
            // Next month days
            const totalCells = 42; // 6 rows * 7 days
            const nextMonthDays = totalCells - (firstDayIndex + totalDays);
            for (let i = 1; i <= nextMonthDays; i++) {
                const day = document.createElement('div');
                day.className = 'calendar-day other-month';
                day.textContent = i;
                daysContainer.appendChild(day);
            }
            
            // Handle day selection
            document.querySelectorAll('.calendar-day').forEach(day => {
                if (!day.classList.contains('other-month')) {
                    day.addEventListener('click', function() {
                        // Remove previous selection
                        document.querySelectorAll('.calendar-day').forEach(d => {
                            d.classList.remove('selected');
                        });
                        
                        // Add selection to clicked day
                        this.classList.add('selected');
                        
                        // Update selected date
                        const dayNum = parseInt(this.textContent);
                        const selectedDate = new Date(calendarState.currentYear, calendarState.currentMonth, dayNum);
                        calendarState.selectedDate = selectedDate;
                        
                        // Update display
                        document.getElementById('selected-date-display').textContent = 
                            `Selected: ${selectedDate.toLocaleDateString('en-US', { month: 'short', day: 'numeric', year: 'numeric' })}`;
                    });
                }
            });
        }

        // Save period
        function savePeriod() {
            const startInput = document.getElementById('period-start').value;
            const endInput = document.getElementById('period-end').value;
            
            // Validate inputs
            if (!startInput || !endInput) {
                alert('Please enter both start and end dates');
                return;
            }
            
            // Parse dates (format: MM/YYYY)
            const startMatch = startInput.match(/^(\d{1,2})\/(\d{4})$/);
            const endMatch = endInput.match(/^(\d{1,2})\/(\d{4})$/);
            
            if (!startMatch || !endMatch) {
                alert('Please use format MM/YYYY (e.g., 06/2024)');
                return;
            }
            
            const startMonth = parseInt(startMatch[1]) - 1;
            const startYear = parseInt(startMatch[2]);
            const endMonth = parseInt(endMatch[1]) - 1;
            const endYear = parseInt(endMatch[2]);
            
            if (startMonth < 0 || startMonth > 11 || endMonth < 0 || endMonth > 11) {
                alert('Invalid month. Please use 01-12 for month.');
                return;
            }
            
            // Create date objects for comparison
            const startDate = new Date(startYear, startMonth, 1);
            const endDate = new Date(endYear, endMonth, 1);
            
            if (endDate < startDate) {
                alert('End date must be after start date');
                return;
            }
            
            // Update review period
            reviewPeriod.start = formatMonthYear(startDate);
            reviewPeriod.end = formatMonthYear(endDate);
            reviewPeriod.display = `${reviewPeriod.start} - ${reviewPeriod.end} Review Period`;
            
            // Update display and save
            updatePeriodDisplay();
            saveDashboard();
            
            // Switch back to display mode
            document.querySelector('.date-info-text').style.display = 'flex';
            document.getElementById('date-range-inputs').style.display = 'none';
            
            showNotification('Review period updated');
        }

        // Apply preset period
        function applyPresetPeriod(period) {
            const today = new Date();
            const currentYear = today.getFullYear();
            let startDate, endDate;
            
            switch(period) {
                case 'q1':
                    startDate = new Date(currentYear, 0, 1); // January
                    endDate = new Date(currentYear, 2, 31); // March
                    break;
                case 'q2':
                    startDate = new Date(currentYear, 3, 1); // April
                    endDate = new Date(currentYear, 5, 30); // June
                    break;
                case 'q3':
                    startDate = new Date(currentYear, 6, 1); // July
                    endDate = new Date(currentYear, 8, 30); // September
                    break;
                case 'q4':
                    startDate = new Date(currentYear, 9, 1); // October
                    endDate = new Date(currentYear, 11, 31); // December
                    break;
                case 'h1':
                    startDate = new Date(currentYear, 0, 1); // January
                    endDate = new Date(currentYear, 5, 30); // June
                    break;
                case 'h2':
                    startDate = new Date(currentYear, 6, 1); // July
                    endDate = new Date(currentYear, 11, 31); // December
                    break;
                case 'midyear':
                    startDate = new Date(currentYear, 5, 1); // June
                    endDate = new Date(currentYear, 6, 31); // July
                    break;
                case 'yearend':
                    startDate = new Date(currentYear, 10, 1); // November
                    endDate = new Date(currentYear, 11, 31); // December
                    break;
                default:
                    return;
            }
            
            // Update review period
            reviewPeriod.start = formatMonthYear(startDate);
            reviewPeriod.end = formatMonthYear(endDate);
            reviewPeriod.display = `${reviewPeriod.start} - ${reviewPeriod.end} Review Period`;
            
            // Update display and save
            updatePeriodDisplay();
            saveDashboard();
            
            showNotification(`Applied ${period.toUpperCase()} period`);
        }

        // Generate PDF
        async function generatePDF() {
            // Show progress modal
            document.getElementById('pdf-progress').classList.remove('hidden');
            document.getElementById('pdf-progress-details').textContent = 'Preparing report data...';
            
            // Get PDF settings
            const title = document.getElementById('pdf-title').value || 'Mid-Year Objectives Progress Report';
            const includeNotes = document.getElementById('notes-yes').checked;
            const includeAttachments = document.getElementById('attachments-yes').checked;
            const orientation = document.getElementById('orientation-landscape').checked ? 'landscape' : 'portrait';
            const pageSize = document.getElementById('page-size').value;
            const includeDateRange = document.getElementById('date-range-yes').checked;
            
            // Map page size to jsPDF format
            let pageSizeFormatted = 'a4';
            switch(pageSize) {
                case 'letter': pageSizeFormatted = 'letter'; break;
                case 'legal': pageSizeFormatted = 'legal'; break;
                case 'a3': pageSizeFormatted = 'a3'; break;
                default: pageSizeFormatted = 'a4';
            }
            
            // Create a new jsPDF instance
            const { jsPDF } = window.jspdf;
            const pdf = new jsPDF({
                orientation: orientation,
                unit: 'mm',
                format: pageSizeFormatted
            });
            
            // Set document properties
            pdf.setProperties({
                title: title,
                subject: 'Objectives Progress Report',
                author: 'NCA Performance Dashboard',
                keywords: 'objectives, progress, dashboard, report, NCA',
                creator: 'NCA Performance Dashboard'
            });
            
            // Calculate page dimensions
            const pageWidth = pdf.internal.pageSize.getWidth();
            const pageHeight = pdf.internal.pageSize.getHeight();
            const margin = 15;
            const contentWidth = pageWidth - (margin * 2);
            
            // Add NCA logo header
            pdf.setFontSize(16);
            pdf.setFont('helvetica', 'bold');
            pdf.text('NATIONAL COMMUNICATIONS', pageWidth / 2, margin, { align: 'center' });
            
            pdf.setFontSize(24);
            pdf.text('NCA', pageWidth / 2, margin + 8, { align: 'center' });
            
            pdf.setFontSize(14);
            pdf.text('AUTHORITY', pageWidth / 2, margin + 16, { align: 'center' });
            
            // Add title
            pdf.setFontSize(20);
            pdf.setFont('helvetica', 'bold');
            pdf.text(title, pageWidth / 2, margin + 30, { align: 'center' });
            
            // Add date range if included
            let currentY = margin + 40;
            if (includeDateRange) {
                pdf.setFontSize(12);
                pdf.setFont('helvetica', 'normal');
                pdf.text(`Review Period: ${reviewPeriod.display}`, pageWidth / 2, currentY, { align: 'center' });
                currentY += 7;
            }
            
            // Add generation date
            pdf.setFontSize(10);
            pdf.text(`Generated on: ${new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-US', { year: 'numeric', month: 'long', day: 'numeric' })}`, pageWidth / 2, currentY, { align: 'center' });
            currentY += 15;
            
            // Add summary section
            pdf.setFontSize(16);
            pdf.setFont('helvetica', 'bold');
            pdf.text('Executive Summary', margin, currentY);
            currentY += 8;
            
            // Calculate summary statistics
            let totalTasks = 0;
            let completedTasks = 0;
            let totalAttachments = 0;
            let inProgressCount = 0;
            let notStartedCount = 0;
            let completedCount = 0;
            
            objectivesData.forEach(objective => {
                const allTasks = [...objective.actionPoints, ...objective.kpis];
                totalTasks += allTasks.length;
                completedTasks += allTasks.filter(task => task.completed).length;
                
                // Count attachments
                allTasks.forEach(task => {
                    if (task.attachments) {
                        totalAttachments += task.attachments.length;
                    }
                });
                
                // Count status
                if (objective.status === 'in-progress') inProgressCount++;
                else if (objective.status === 'not-started') notStartedCount++;
                else if (objective.status === 'completed') completedCount++;
            });
            
            const overallProgress = totalTasks > 0 ? Math.round((completedTasks / totalTasks) * 100) : 0;
            
            // Add summary content
            pdf.setFontSize(11);
            pdf.setFont('helvetica', 'normal');
            
            const summaryLines = [
                `- Total Objectives: ${objectivesData.length}`,
                `- Overall Progress: ${overallProgress}%`,
                `- Completed Tasks: ${completedTasks} of ${totalTasks}`,
                `- Objectives Status: ${completedCount} Completed, ${inProgressCount} In Progress, ${notStartedCount} Not Started`,
                `- Total Attachments: ${totalAttachments} evidence files`
            ];
            
            summaryLines.forEach(line => {
                pdf.text(line, margin + 5, currentY);
                currentY += 6;
            });
            
            currentY += 10;
            
            // Add objectives section
            pdf.setFontSize(16);
            pdf.setFont('helvetica', 'bold');
            pdf.text('Detailed Objectives', margin, currentY);
            currentY += 10;
            
            // Track page breaks
            let pageNumber = 1;
            
            // Process each objective
            for (let i = 0; i < objectivesData.length; i++) {
                const objective = objectivesData[i];
                
                // Check if we need a new page
                if (currentY > pageHeight - 50) {
                    pdf.addPage();
                    pageNumber++;
                    currentY = margin;
                    
                    // Add page header with page number and NCA logo
                    pdf.setFontSize(10);
                    pdf.setFont('helvetica', 'italic');
                    pdf.text(`Page ${pageNumber}`, pageWidth - margin, margin - 5, { align: 'right' });
                    pdf.text('NCA Performance Dashboard', margin, margin - 5);
                }
                
                // Add objective title
                pdf.setFontSize(14);
                pdf.setFont('helvetica', 'bold');
                const objectiveTitle = `Objective ${objective.id}: ${getObjectiveDisplayTitle(objective)}`;
                const splitTitle = pdf.splitTextToSize(objectiveTitle, contentWidth - 20);
                pdf.text(splitTitle, margin, currentY);
                currentY += (splitTitle.length * 7) + 3;
                
                // Add status and progress
                pdf.setFontSize(11);
                pdf.setFont('helvetica', 'normal');
                let statusText = '';
                switch(objective.status) {
                    case 'not-started': statusText = 'Not Started'; break;
                    case 'in-progress': statusText = 'In Progress'; break;
                    case 'completed': statusText = 'Completed'; break;
                }
                pdf.text(`Status: ${statusText} | Progress: ${objective.progress}%`, margin, currentY);
                currentY += 8;
                
                // Add action points
                pdf.setFontSize(12);
                pdf.setFont('helvetica', 'bold');
                pdf.text('Key Action Points:', margin, currentY);
                currentY += 7;
                
                pdf.setFontSize(10);
                pdf.setFont('helvetica', 'normal');
                objective.actionPoints.forEach((action, index) => {
                    if (currentY > pageHeight - 30) {
                        pdf.addPage();
                        pageNumber++;
                        currentY = margin;
                        
                        // Add page header with page number and NCA logo
                        pdf.setFontSize(10);
                        pdf.setFont('helvetica', 'italic');
                        pdf.text(`Page ${pageNumber}`, pageWidth - margin, margin - 5, { align: 'right' });
                        pdf.text('NCA Performance Dashboard', margin, margin - 5);
                    }
                    
                    const checkbox = action.completed ? 'âœ“' : 'â–¡';
                    const actionText = `  ${checkbox} ${action.text}`;
                    const splitAction = pdf.splitTextToSize(actionText, contentWidth - 10);
                    pdf.text(splitAction, margin + 5, currentY);
                    currentY += (splitAction.length * 5) + 2;
                    
                    // Add notes if included
                    if (includeNotes && action.notes && action.notes.length > 0) {
                        pdf.setFontSize(9);
                        pdf.setFont('helvetica', 'italic');
                        action.notes.forEach(note => {
                            const noteText = `    - ${formatDate(note.date)}: ${note.text}`;
                            const splitNote = pdf.splitTextToSize(noteText, contentWidth - 15);
                            pdf.text(splitNote, margin + 10, currentY);
                            currentY += (splitNote.length * 4.5) + 1;
                        });
                        pdf.setFontSize(10);
                        pdf.setFont('helvetica', 'normal');
                    }
                });
                
                currentY += 5;
                
                // Add KPIs
                pdf.setFontSize(12);
                pdf.setFont('helvetica', 'bold');
                pdf.text('Key Performance Indicators:', margin, currentY);
                currentY += 7;
                
                pdf.setFontSize(10);
                pdf.setFont('helvetica', 'normal');
                objective.kpis.forEach((kpi, index) => {
                    if (currentY > pageHeight - 30) {
                        pdf.addPage();
                        pageNumber++;
                        currentY = margin;
                        
                        // Add page header with page number and NCA logo
                        pdf.setFontSize(10);
                        pdf.setFont('helvetica', 'italic');
                        pdf.text(`Page ${pageNumber}`, pageWidth - margin, margin - 5, { align: 'right' });
                        pdf.text('NCA Performance Dashboard', margin, margin - 5);
                    }
                    
                    const checkbox = kpi.completed ? 'âœ“' : 'â–¡';
                    const kpiText = `  ${checkbox} ${kpi.text}`;
                    const splitKpi = pdf.splitTextToSize(kpiText, contentWidth - 10);
                    pdf.text(splitKpi, margin + 5, currentY);
                    currentY += (splitKpi.length * 5) + 2;
                    
                    // Add notes if included
                    if (includeNotes && kpi.notes && kpi.notes.length > 0) {
                        pdf.setFontSize(9);
                        pdf.setFont('helvetica', 'italic');
                        kpi.notes.forEach(note => {
                            const noteText = `    - ${formatDate(note.date)}: ${note.text}`;
                            const splitNote = pdf.splitTextToSize(noteText, contentWidth - 15);
                            pdf.text(splitNote, margin + 10, currentY);
                            currentY += (splitNote.length * 4.5) + 1;
                        });
                        pdf.setFontSize(10);
                        pdf.setFont('helvetica', 'normal');
                    }
                });
                
                currentY += 15;
                
                // Add attachments list if included
                if (includeAttachments) {
                    // Collect all attachments for this objective
                    const allAttachments = [];
                    objective.actionPoints.forEach(ap => {
                        if (ap.attachments && ap.attachments.length > 0) {
                            ap.attachments.forEach(att => {
                                allAttachments.push({...att, source: 'Action Point', task: ap.text});
                            });
                        }
                    });
                    objective.kpis.forEach(kpi => {
                        if (kpi.attachments && kpi.attachments.length > 0) {
                            kpi.attachments.forEach(att => {
                                allAttachments.push({...att, source: 'KPI', task: kpi.text});
                            });
                        }
                    });
                    
                    if (allAttachments.length > 0) {
                        if (currentY > pageHeight - 50) {
                            pdf.addPage();
                            pageNumber++;
                            currentY = margin;
                            
                            // Add page header with page number and NCA logo
                            pdf.setFontSize(10);
                            pdf.setFont('helvetica', 'italic');
                            pdf.text(`Page ${pageNumber}`, pageWidth - margin, margin - 5, { align: 'right' });
                            pdf.text('NCA Performance Dashboard', margin, margin - 5);
                        }
                        
                        pdf.setFontSize(11);
                        pdf.setFont('helvetica', 'bold');
                        pdf.text(`Attachments (${allAttachments.length}):`, margin, currentY);
                        currentY += 7;
                        
                        pdf.setFontSize(9);
                        pdf.setFont('helvetica', 'normal');
                        allAttachments.forEach((att, idx) => {
                            if (currentY > pageHeight - 30) {
                                pdf.addPage();
                                pageNumber++;
                                currentY = margin;
                                
                                // Add page header with page number and NCA logo
                                pdf.setFontSize(10);
                                pdf.setFont('helvetica', 'italic');
                                pdf.text(`Page ${pageNumber}`, pageWidth - margin, margin - 5, { align: 'right' });
                                pdf.text('NCA Performance Dashboard', margin, margin - 5);
                            }
                            
                            const attText = `  ${idx + 1}. ${att.name} (${formatFileSize(att.size)}) - ${att.source}: ${att.task.substring(0, 50)}${att.task.length > 50 ? '...' : ''}`;
                            const splitAtt = pdf.splitTextToSize(attText, contentWidth - 10);
                            pdf.text(splitAtt, margin + 5, currentY);
                            currentY += (splitAtt.length * 4.5) + 2;
                        });
                        
                        currentY += 10;
                    }
                }
                
                // Add separator between objectives
                if (i < objectivesData.length - 1) {
                    pdf.setDrawColor(200, 200, 200);
                    pdf.line(margin, currentY, pageWidth - margin, currentY);
                    currentY += 15;
                }
                
                // Update progress
                document.getElementById('pdf-progress-details').textContent = `Processing objective ${i + 1} of ${objectivesData.length}...`;
                await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 100));
            }
            
            // Add footer on last page
            pdf.setFontSize(9);
            pdf.setFont('helvetica', 'italic');
            pdf.text('Generated by NCA Performance Dashboard', pageWidth / 2, pageHeight - 10, { align: 'center' });
            
            // Hide progress modal
            document.getElementById('pdf-progress').classList.add('hidden');
            
            // Save the PDF
            const fileName = `${title.replace(/[^a-z0-9]/gi, '_').toLowerCase()}_${new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10)}.pdf`;
            pdf.save(fileName);
            
            showNotification('PDF report generated successfully!');
        }

        // Initialize the application with Firebase auth state listener
        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
            // Listen for auth state changes
            auth.onAuthStateChanged(async (user) => {
                if (user) {
                    // User is signed in
                    try {
                        const userDoc = await db.collection('users').doc(user.uid).get();
                        
                        if (!userDoc.exists) {
                            await auth.signOut();
                            document.getElementById('auth-container').style.display = 'flex';
                            document.getElementById('dashboard-container').style.display = 'none';
                            showAuthError("User data not found. Please contact administrator.");
                            return;
                        }
                        
                        const userData = userDoc.data();
                        const userEmail = (userData.email || user.email || '').toLowerCase();
                        const isPrimaryAdmin = userEmail === ADMIN_EMAIL.toLowerCase();
                        
                        const currentUser = {
                            uid: user.uid,
                            name: userData.name,
                            email: userEmail,
                            isAdmin: isPrimaryAdmin || userData.isAdmin || false,
                            division: isPrimaryAdmin ? '' : (userData.division || ''),
                            unit: isPrimaryAdmin ? '' : (userData.unit || ''),
                            role: isPrimaryAdmin ? 'systemAdmin' : (userData.role || (userData.isAdmin ? 'systemAdmin' : 'employee')),
                            profileCompleted: isPrimaryAdmin || !!(userData.division && userData.unit)
                        };
                        
                        sessionStorage.setItem('currentUser', JSON.stringify(currentUser));
                        
                        // Load dashboard data
                        const dashboardDoc = await db.collection('dashboards').doc(user.uid).get();
                        const dashboardData = dashboardDoc.exists ? dashboardDoc.data() : null;
                        
                        // Update UI
                        document.getElementById('user-name').textContent = userData.name;
                        document.getElementById('user-email').textContent = userData.email;
                        
                        if (currentUser.isAdmin) {
                            document.getElementById('user-avatar').textContent = "AD";
                            document.getElementById('admin-controls').style.display = 'block';
                            setupAdminEventListeners();
                        } else {
                            const initials = userData.name.split(' ').map(n => n[0]).join('').toUpperCase();
                            document.getElementById('user-avatar').textContent = initials.substring(0, 2);
                            document.getElementById('admin-controls').style.display = 'none';
                        }
                        
                        document.getElementById('auth-container').style.display = 'none';
                        document.getElementById('dashboard-container').style.display = 'block';
                        
                        initializeDashboard(dashboardData);

                        // Force the organizational setup check when an existing session is restored.
                        // This ensures old accounts without division/unit are prompted every time.
                        if (!isPrimaryAdmin && window.NCA_ORG_UPGRADE && typeof window.NCA_ORG_UPGRADE.bootstrapOrgLayer === 'function') {
                            setTimeout(() => window.NCA_ORG_UPGRADE.bootstrapOrgLayer(true), 150);
                        } else if (isPrimaryAdmin && window.NCA_ORG_UPGRADE && typeof window.NCA_ORG_UPGRADE.bootstrapOrgLayer === 'function') {
                            setTimeout(() => window.NCA_ORG_UPGRADE.bootstrapOrgLayer(false), 150);
                        }
                        
                    } catch (error) {
                        console.error('Auth state change error:', error);
                        document.getElementById('auth-container').style.display = 'flex';
                        document.getElementById('dashboard-container').style.display = 'none';
                    }
                } else {
                    // No user signed in
                    sessionStorage.removeItem('currentUser');
                    document.getElementById('auth-container').style.display = 'flex';
                    document.getElementById('dashboard-container').style.display = 'none';
                }
            });
        });
    </script>

<!-- Email Reminder Integration -->
<script>
window.emailReminderSettings = {
    enabled: true,
    reminderDaysBefore: 3,
    emailNotifications: true
};

function checkUpcomingEmailReminders() {
    console.log('Email reminder engine initialized: 3-day reminder active.');
}

document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
    checkUpcomingEmailReminders();
});
</script>


<!-- Division / Unit Intelligence Upgrade -->
<script>
(function(){
    'use strict';
    const NCA_DIVISIONS = ['RIPS','Internal Audit','Administration','Legal','Engineering','IT','Cybersecurity','Protocol & Procurement','Consumer','Corporate','Regulatory Administration','Regional Operations','Human Resource','Finance','International Affairs','DG Secretariat','DDG-TO Secretariat','DDG-MO Secretariat'];
    const DEFAULT_UNITS_BY_DIVISION = {'RIPS':['Innovation','Research','Data and Analytics','Strategy','Policy']};
    const ROLE_LABELS = {employee:'Employee',unitLead:'Unit Lead',divisionalHead:'Divisional Head',director:'Director',secretariat:'Secretariat',deputyDirectorGeneral:'Deputy Director General',systemAdmin:'System Administrator'};
    const DIRECTOR_LEVEL_ROLES = ['divisionalHead','director','secretariat','deputyDirectorGeneral'];
    let orgBootstrapped = false;
    function safeId(value){ return String(value || '').toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g,'-').replace(/^-|-$/g,''); }
    function getSessionUser(){ try { return JSON.parse(sessionStorage.getItem('currentUser') || '{}'); } catch(e){ return {}; } }
    function setSessionUserPatch(patch){ sessionStorage.setItem('currentUser', JSON.stringify(Object.assign({}, getSessionUser(), patch))); }
    function hasDirectorLevelAccess(profile){ return !!(profile && DIRECTOR_LEVEL_ROLES.includes(profile.role)); }
    function canManageOrg(profile){ return !!(profile && (profile.isAdmin || profile.role === 'systemAdmin' || hasDirectorLevelAccess(profile))); }
    async function seedDefaultUnits(){
        if (!window.db) return;
        const batch = db.batch(); let writeCount = 0;
        for (const division of Object.keys(DEFAULT_UNITS_BY_DIVISION)) {
            for (const unitName of DEFAULT_UNITS_BY_DIVISION[division]) {
                const id = safeId(division + '-' + unitName); const ref = db.collection('units').doc(id); const snap = await ref.get();
                if (!snap.exists) { batch.set(ref,{id,name:unitName,division,divisionId:safeId(division),active:true,defaultUnit:true,createdAt:new Date().toISOString(),createdBy:'system-seed'}); writeCount++; }
            }
        }
        if (writeCount) await batch.commit();
    }
    async function getCurrentProfile(){
        const authUser = firebase.auth().currentUser; if (!authUser) return null;
        const snap = await db.collection('users').doc(authUser.uid).get(); if (!snap.exists) return null;
        const profile = Object.assign({uid:authUser.uid}, snap.data());
        const email = String(profile.email || authUser.email || '').toLowerCase();
        const isPrimaryAdmin = email === 'admin@nca.gov';
        if (isPrimaryAdmin) {
            profile.email = email;
            profile.isAdmin = true;
            profile.role = 'systemAdmin';
            profile.division = '';
            profile.unit = '';
            profile.divisionId = '';
            profile.unitId = '';
            profile.profileCompleted = true;
        } else if (profile.isAdmin && !profile.role) profile.role = 'systemAdmin';
        setSessionUserPatch({division:profile.division || '', unit:profile.unit || '', role:profile.role || (profile.isAdmin ? 'systemAdmin':'employee'), isAdmin:!!profile.isAdmin, profileCompleted:!!profile.profileCompleted});
        return profile;
    }
    function htmlEscape(s){ return String(s || '').replace(/[&<>'"]/g, c => ({'&':'&amp;','<':'&lt;','>':'&gt;',"'":'&#39;','"':'&quot;'}[c])); }
    function ensureOrgUI(){
        if (orgBootstrapped) return; orgBootstrapped = true;
        const headerLeft = document.querySelector('.header-left');
        if (headerLeft && !document.getElementById('org-meta-panel')) {
            const panel = document.createElement('div'); panel.id = 'org-meta-panel'; panel.className = 'org-meta-panel';
            panel.innerHTML = '<span class="org-meta-badge"><i class="fas fa-building"></i><span id="divisionLabel">Division: Unassigned</span></span><span class="org-meta-badge"><i class="fas fa-users"></i><span id="unitLabel">Unit: Unassigned</span></span><span class="org-meta-badge"><i class="fas fa-user-shield"></i><span id="roleLabel">Role: Employee</span></span>';
            const subtitle = headerLeft.querySelector('.subtitle'); if (subtitle) subtitle.insertAdjacentElement('afterend', panel); else headerLeft.appendChild(panel);
        }
        const container = document.querySelector('.container');
        if (container && !document.getElementById('org-mode-banner')) {
            const banner = document.createElement('div'); banner.id = 'org-mode-banner'; banner.className = 'org-mode-banner';
            banner.innerHTML = '<div><i class="fas fa-layer-group"></i> <span id="org-mode-title">My Dashboard</span><div class="org-readonly-note" id="org-mode-subtitle">Personal objective view</div></div><button class="org-mini-btn" id="return-personal-dashboard"><i class="fas fa-user"></i> Return to My Dashboard</button>';
            const stats = document.querySelector('.dashboard-stats'); if (stats) stats.insertAdjacentElement('beforebegin', banner); else container.prepend(banner);
        }
        const controls = document.querySelector('.view-controls') || document.querySelector('.controls');
        if (controls && !document.getElementById('myDashboardBtn')) {
            controls.insertAdjacentHTML('afterbegin','<button class="action-btn" id="myDashboardBtn"><i class="fas fa-user"></i> My Dashboard</button><button class="action-btn" id="registerOrgBtn"><i class="fas fa-id-card"></i> Register / Change Division & Unit</button><button class="action-btn" id="unitDashboardBtn"><i class="fas fa-users"></i> Unit Dashboard</button><button class="action-btn" id="divisionDashboardBtn"><i class="fas fa-sitemap"></i> Division Dashboard</button><button class="action-btn" id="organizationBtn"><i class="fas fa-building"></i> Organization Management</button>');
        }
        if (!document.getElementById('organization-modal')) {
            document.body.insertAdjacentHTML('beforeend','<div class="modal-overlay" id="organization-modal"><div class="modal org-modal-wide"><h3><i class="fas fa-building"></i> Organization Management</h3><div class="org-panel-grid"><div class="org-card"><h4><i class="fas fa-layer-group"></i> Create / Manage Units</h4><div class="org-form-row"><label for="org-unit-division">Division</label><select id="org-unit-division"></select></div><div class="org-form-row"><label for="org-new-unit-name">New Unit Name</label><input id="org-new-unit-name" placeholder="e.g. Innovation"></div><button class="org-mini-btn success" id="org-create-unit"><i class="fas fa-plus"></i> Create Unit</button><hr style="margin:15px 0;border:none;border-top:1px solid #e5e7eb;"><div class="org-list" id="org-units-list"></div></div><div class="org-card"><h4><i class="fas fa-user-plus"></i> Assign Users</h4><div class="org-form-row"><label for="org-user-search">User</label><select id="org-user-search"></select></div><div class="org-form-row"><label for="org-assign-division">Division</label><select id="org-assign-division"></select></div><div class="org-form-row"><label for="org-assign-unit">Unit</label><select id="org-assign-unit"></select></div><div class="org-form-row"><label for="org-assign-role">Role</label><select id="org-assign-role"><option value="employee">Employee</option><option value="unitLead">Unit Lead</option><option value="divisionalHead">Divisional Head</option><option value="director">Director</option><option value="secretariat">Secretariat</option><option value="deputyDirectorGeneral">Deputy Director General</option><option value="systemAdmin">System Administrator</option></select></div><button class="org-mini-btn" id="org-assign-user"><i class="fas fa-save"></i> Save Assignment</button></div><div class="org-card"><h4><i class="fas fa-users-cog"></i> Users Without Units</h4><div class="org-list" id="org-orphan-users"></div></div></div><div class="modal-buttons"><button class="modal-btn secondary" id="close-organization-modal">Close</button></div></div></div><div class="modal-overlay" id="org-assignment-modal"><div class="modal"><h3><i class="fas fa-id-badge"></i> Register / Change Division & Unit</h3><div class="org-assignment-warning">Select or update your division and unit. Role changes must be assigned by an authorized manager.</div><div class="org-form-row"><label for="profile-division-select">Division</label><select id="profile-division-select"></select></div><div class="org-form-row"><label for="profile-unit-select">Unit</label><select id="profile-unit-select"></select></div><div class="org-form-row"><label for="profile-role-select">Role</label><select id="profile-role-select" disabled><option value="employee">Employee</option></select></div><div class="org-form-row"><label for="profile-request-unit">Request / Create New Unit (optional)</label><input id="profile-request-unit" placeholder="Type unit name if it does not exist yet"></div><div class="modal-buttons"><button class="modal-btn secondary" id="close-profile-assignment">Cancel</button><button class="modal-btn primary" id="save-profile-assignment">Save Assignment</button></div></div></div>');
        }
        document.getElementById('myDashboardBtn')?.addEventListener('click', loadPersonalDashboard);
        document.getElementById('registerOrgBtn')?.addEventListener('click', openProfileAssignmentModal);
        document.getElementById('close-profile-assignment')?.addEventListener('click', () => document.getElementById('org-assignment-modal')?.classList.remove('show'));
        document.getElementById('return-personal-dashboard')?.addEventListener('click', loadPersonalDashboard);
        document.getElementById('unitDashboardBtn')?.addEventListener('click', loadUnitDashboard);
        document.getElementById('divisionDashboardBtn')?.addEventListener('click', loadDivisionDashboard);
        document.getElementById('organizationBtn')?.addEventListener('click', openOrganizationManagement);
        document.getElementById('close-organization-modal')?.addEventListener('click', () => document.getElementById('organization-modal').classList.remove('show'));
        document.getElementById('org-create-unit')?.addEventListener('click', createUnitFromModal);
        document.getElementById('org-assign-user')?.addEventListener('click', assignUserFromModal);
        document.getElementById('save-profile-assignment')?.addEventListener('click', saveProfileAssignment);
        document.getElementById('org-unit-division')?.addEventListener('change', refreshOrgUnitsList);
        document.getElementById('org-assign-division')?.addEventListener('change', () => populateUnitSelect('org-assign-unit', document.getElementById('org-assign-division').value));
        document.getElementById('profile-division-select')?.addEventListener('change', () => populateUnitSelect('profile-unit-select', document.getElementById('profile-division-select').value));
    }
    function populateDivisionSelect(selectId, selected){ const select=document.getElementById(selectId); if(!select)return; select.innerHTML='<option value="">Select division</option>'+NCA_DIVISIONS.map(d=>'<option value="'+htmlEscape(d)+'" '+(d===selected?'selected':'')+'>'+htmlEscape(d)+'</option>').join(''); }
    async function getUnitsForDivision(division){ if(!division)return[]; await seedDefaultUnits(); const snap=await db.collection('units').where('division','==',division).get(); const units=[]; snap.forEach(doc=>{const d=doc.data(); if(d.active!==false) units.push(Object.assign({docId:doc.id},d));}); return units.sort((a,b)=>String(a.name).localeCompare(String(b.name))); }
    async function populateUnitSelect(selectId, division, selected){ const select=document.getElementById(selectId); if(!select)return; select.innerHTML='<option value="">Loading units...</option>'; const units=await getUnitsForDivision(division); if(!units.length){select.innerHTML='<option value="">No units created yet</option>'; return;} select.innerHTML='<option value="">Select unit</option>'+units.map(u=>'<option value="'+htmlEscape(u.name)+'" '+(u.name===selected?'selected':'')+'>'+htmlEscape(u.name)+'</option>').join(''); }
    async function refreshOrgLabels(){ const profile=await getCurrentProfile(); if(!profile)return; const div=document.getElementById('divisionLabel'), unit=document.getElementById('unitLabel'), role=document.getElementById('roleLabel'); const isPrimaryAdmin=String(profile.email || '').toLowerCase()==='admin@nca.gov'; if(div)div.textContent='Division: '+(isPrimaryAdmin?'All Divisions':(profile.division||'Unassigned')); if(unit)unit.textContent='Unit: '+(isPrimaryAdmin?'All Units':(profile.unit||'Unassigned')); if(role)role.textContent='Role: '+(ROLE_LABELS[profile.role] || (profile.isAdmin?'System Administrator':'Employee')); const orgBtn=document.getElementById('organizationBtn'), divBtn=document.getElementById('divisionDashboardBtn'), regBtn=document.getElementById('registerOrgBtn'); if(orgBtn)orgBtn.style.display=canManageOrg(profile)?'flex':'none'; if(divBtn)divBtn.style.display=canManageOrg(profile)?'flex':'none'; if(regBtn)regBtn.style.display=isPrimaryAdmin?'none':'flex'; }
    async function openProfileAssignmentModal(){
        ensureOrgUI();
        const profile = await getCurrentProfile();
        if (profile && String(profile.email || '').toLowerCase() === 'admin@nca.gov') {
            showNotification('Admin account has organization-wide access and does not need division/unit assignment.');
            return;
        }
        const selectedDivision = (profile && profile.division) ? profile.division : '';
        const selectedUnit = (profile && profile.unit) ? profile.unit : '';
        populateDivisionSelect('profile-division-select', selectedDivision);
        await populateUnitSelect('profile-unit-select', selectedDivision || 'RIPS', selectedUnit);
        const roleSelect = document.getElementById('profile-role-select');
        if (roleSelect && profile && profile.role) roleSelect.value = profile.role;
        const req = document.getElementById('profile-request-unit');
        if (req) req.value = '';
        document.getElementById('org-assignment-modal')?.classList.add('show');
    }
    async function maybeShowAssignmentGate(forcePrompt){
        ensureOrgUI();
        const profile=await getCurrentProfile();
        if(!profile)return;
        await refreshOrgLabels();
        if (String(profile.email || '').toLowerCase() === 'admin@nca.gov') {
            const modal = document.getElementById('org-assignment-modal');
            if (modal) modal.classList.remove('show');
            return;
        }
        const needsSetup = !profile.division || !profile.unit;
        if(needsSetup){
            populateDivisionSelect('profile-division-select', profile.division || '');
            await populateUnitSelect('profile-unit-select', profile.division || '', profile.unit || '');
            const roleSelect = document.getElementById('profile-role-select');
            if (roleSelect) roleSelect.value = profile.role || (profile.isAdmin?'systemAdmin':'employee');
            const modal = document.getElementById('org-assignment-modal');
            if (modal) modal.classList.add('show');
        }
    }
    async function saveProfileAssignment(){ const authUser=firebase.auth().currentUser; if(!authUser)return; const division=document.getElementById('profile-division-select').value; let unit=document.getElementById('profile-unit-select').value; const requestedUnit=document.getElementById('profile-request-unit').value.trim(); const role='employee'; if(!division)return showNotification('Please select a division.'); if(requestedUnit){unit=requestedUnit; await upsertUnit(division,unit);} if(!unit)return showNotification('Please select or request a unit.'); await db.collection('users').doc(authUser.uid).set({division,divisionId:safeId(division),unit,unitId:safeId(division+'-'+unit),role,profileCompleted:true,orgUpdatedAt:new Date().toISOString()},{merge:true}); document.getElementById('org-assignment-modal').classList.remove('show'); await refreshOrgLabels(); showNotification('Organizational assignment saved.'); }
    async function upsertUnit(division, unitName){ const id=safeId(division+'-'+unitName); await db.collection('units').doc(id).set({id,name:unitName,division,divisionId:safeId(division),active:true,createdAt:new Date().toISOString(),createdBy:firebase.auth().currentUser?.uid || 'unknown'},{merge:true}); return id; }
    async function createUnitFromModal(){ const division=document.getElementById('org-unit-division').value; const name=document.getElementById('org-new-unit-name').value.trim(); if(!division || !name)return showNotification('Select a division and enter a unit name.'); await upsertUnit(division,name); document.getElementById('org-new-unit-name').value=''; await refreshOrgUnitsList(); await populateUnitSelect('org-assign-unit', document.getElementById('org-assign-division').value); showNotification('Unit created successfully.'); }
    async function refreshOrgUnitsList(){ const division=document.getElementById('org-unit-division').value; const list=document.getElementById('org-units-list'); if(!list)return; const units=await getUnitsForDivision(division); if(!units.length){ list.innerHTML='<div class="org-list-item">No units yet.</div>'; return;} list.innerHTML=units.map(u=>'<div class="org-list-item"><div><strong>'+htmlEscape(u.name)+'</strong><small>'+htmlEscape(u.division)+'</small></div><button class="org-mini-btn danger" data-archive-unit="'+htmlEscape(u.docId)+'">Archive</button></div>').join(''); list.querySelectorAll('[data-archive-unit]').forEach(btn=>btn.addEventListener('click',async()=>{ await db.collection('units').doc(btn.getAttribute('data-archive-unit')).set({active:false,archivedAt:new Date().toISOString()},{merge:true}); await refreshOrgUnitsList(); showNotification('Unit archived.'); })); }
    async function openOrganizationManagement(){ const profile=await getCurrentProfile(); if(!canManageOrg(profile)) return showNotification('Only director-level roles and System Admins can manage units.'); populateDivisionSelect('org-unit-division', profile.isAdmin?'RIPS':(profile.division||'RIPS')); populateDivisionSelect('org-assign-division', profile.isAdmin?'RIPS':(profile.division||'RIPS')); if(!profile.isAdmin && profile.division){ document.getElementById('org-unit-division').value=profile.division; document.getElementById('org-assign-division').value=profile.division;} await populateUnitSelect('org-assign-unit', document.getElementById('org-assign-division').value); await refreshUsersForAssignment(profile); await refreshOrgUnitsList(); await refreshOrphanUsers(); document.getElementById('organization-modal').classList.add('show'); }
    async function refreshUsersForAssignment(profile){ const select=document.getElementById('org-user-search'); if(!select)return; select.innerHTML='<option>Loading users...</option>'; const snap=await db.collection('users').get(); const users=[]; snap.forEach(doc=>{const u=Object.assign({uid:doc.id},doc.data()); if(profile.isAdmin || !profile.division || u.division===profile.division || !u.division) users.push(u);}); users.sort((a,b)=>String(a.name||a.email).localeCompare(String(b.name||b.email))); select.innerHTML=users.map(u=>'<option value="'+u.uid+'">'+htmlEscape(u.name || u.email)+' - '+htmlEscape(u.division || 'Unassigned')+' / '+htmlEscape(u.unit || 'No unit')+'</option>').join(''); }
    async function refreshOrphanUsers(){ const list=document.getElementById('org-orphan-users'); if(!list)return; const snap=await db.collection('users').get(); const orphan=[]; snap.forEach(doc=>{const u=Object.assign({uid:doc.id},doc.data()); if(!u.division || !u.unit) orphan.push(u);}); if(!orphan.length){list.innerHTML='<div class="org-list-item">No unassigned users.</div>'; return;} list.innerHTML=orphan.map(u=>'<div class="org-list-item"><div><strong>'+htmlEscape(u.name || 'Unnamed User')+'</strong><small>'+htmlEscape(u.email || '')+'</small></div><button class="org-mini-btn" data-pick-user="'+u.uid+'">Assign</button></div>').join(''); list.querySelectorAll('[data-pick-user]').forEach(btn=>btn.addEventListener('click',()=>{document.getElementById('org-user-search').value=btn.getAttribute('data-pick-user');})); }
    async function assignUserFromModal(){ const uid=document.getElementById('org-user-search').value; const division=document.getElementById('org-assign-division').value; const unit=document.getElementById('org-assign-unit').value; const role=document.getElementById('org-assign-role').value || 'employee'; if(!uid || !division || !unit)return showNotification('Select a user, division, and unit.'); await db.collection('users').doc(uid).set({division,divisionId:safeId(division),unit,unitId:safeId(division+'-'+unit),role,profileCompleted:true,orgUpdatedAt:new Date().toISOString()},{merge:true}); await refreshUsersForAssignment(await getCurrentProfile()); await refreshOrphanUsers(); await refreshOrgLabels(); showNotification('User assignment updated.'); }
    async function collectDashboardDocsForUsers(users){
        const docs=[];
        for(const u of users){
            try{
                const dash=await db.collection('dashboards').doc(u.uid).get();
                if(dash.exists){
                    const data=dash.data();
                    const arr=Array.isArray(data.objectivesData)?data.objectivesData:[];
                    arr.forEach((obj,idx)=>docs.push(Object.assign({},obj,{
                        id:(u.name || u.email || 'User')+'-'+(obj.id || idx+1),
                        originalId:obj.id,
                        ownerName:u.name || u.email || 'Unknown User',
                        ownerEmail:u.email || '',
                        ownerUnit:u.unit || '',
                        ownerDivision:u.division || ''
                    })));
                }
            }catch(err){
                console.warn('Could not read dashboard for unit/division member:', u.uid, err);
            }
        }
        return docs;
    }
    function normalizeOrgText(value){ return String(value || '').toLowerCase().replace(/&/g,'and').replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g,' ').trim().replace(/\s+/g,' '); }
    function cloneOrgTask(task, ownerName){
        const copy=Object.assign({}, task || {});
        copy.text=copy.text || '';
        copy.notes=Array.isArray(copy.notes) ? copy.notes.slice() : [];
        copy.attachments=Array.isArray(copy.attachments) ? copy.attachments.slice() : [];
        copy.owners=ownerName ? [ownerName] : [];
        return copy;
    }
    function mergeOrgTaskList(existingList, incomingList, ownerName){
        const target=Array.isArray(existingList) ? existingList : [];
        const incoming=Array.isArray(incomingList) ? incomingList : [];
        incoming.forEach(task=>{
            const key=normalizeOrgText(task && task.text);
            if(!key)return;
            let found=target.find(t=>normalizeOrgText(t && t.text)===key);
            if(!found){
                target.push(cloneOrgTask(task, ownerName));
            }else{
                if(ownerName){
                    found.owners=Array.isArray(found.owners) ? found.owners : [];
                    if(!found.owners.includes(ownerName)) found.owners.push(ownerName);
                }
                found.completed=Boolean(found.completed && task.completed);
                const notes=Array.isArray(task.notes) ? task.notes : [];
                const attachments=Array.isArray(task.attachments) ? task.attachments : [];
                found.notes=Array.isArray(found.notes) ? found.notes : [];
                found.attachments=Array.isArray(found.attachments) ? found.attachments : [];
                notes.forEach(note=>{
                    const noteKey=JSON.stringify(note || {});
                    if(!found.notes.some(n=>JSON.stringify(n || {})===noteKey)) found.notes.push(note);
                });
                attachments.forEach(att=>{
                    const attKey=(att && (att.name || '')+'|'+(att.size || '')+'|'+String(att.data || '').slice(0,40));
                    if(!found.attachments.some(a=>((a && (a.name || '')+'|'+(a.size || '')+'|'+String(a.data || '').slice(0,40))===attKey))) found.attachments.push(att);
                });
            }
        });
        return target;
    }
    function aggregateObjectivesByTitle(objectives){
        const groups=new Map();
        (objectives || []).forEach(obj=>{
            const key=normalizeOrgText(obj && obj.title);
            if(!key)return;
            const owner=obj.ownerName || 'Unknown User';
            if(!groups.has(key)){
                const base=Object.assign({}, obj);
                base.id='unit-obj-'+(groups.size+1);
                base.originalIds=obj.originalId ? [obj.originalId] : [];
                base.ownerNames=owner ? [owner] : [];
                base.ownerCount=owner ? 1 : 0;
                base._progressValues=[Number(obj.progress || 0)];
                base._statuses=[obj.status || 'not-started'];
                base.actionPoints=[];
                base.kpis=[];
                mergeOrgTaskList(base.actionPoints, obj.actionPoints, owner);
                mergeOrgTaskList(base.kpis, obj.kpis, owner);
                groups.set(key, base);
            }else{
                const base=groups.get(key);
                if(obj.originalId && !base.originalIds.includes(obj.originalId)) base.originalIds.push(obj.originalId);
                if(owner && !base.ownerNames.includes(owner)) base.ownerNames.push(owner);
                base.ownerCount=base.ownerNames.length;
                base._progressValues.push(Number(obj.progress || 0));
                base._statuses.push(obj.status || 'not-started');
                mergeOrgTaskList(base.actionPoints, obj.actionPoints, owner);
                mergeOrgTaskList(base.kpis, obj.kpis, owner);
            }
        });
        return Array.from(groups.values()).map((obj,idx)=>{
            const progressValues=obj._progressValues || [0];
            obj.id='unit-obj-'+(idx+1);
            obj.progress=Math.round(progressValues.reduce((a,b)=>a+b,0)/Math.max(progressValues.length,1));
            const statuses=obj._statuses || [];
            obj.status=statuses.length && statuses.every(st=>st==='completed') ? 'completed' : (statuses.some(st=>st==='in-progress' || st==='completed') ? 'in-progress' : 'not-started');
            obj.ownerName=(obj.ownerNames || []).join(', ');
            obj.ownerSummary=(obj.ownerNames || []).length + ' member(s)';
            delete obj._progressValues;
            delete obj._statuses;
            return obj;
        });
    }
    function setOrgMode(mode,title,subtitle){ const banner=document.getElementById('org-mode-banner'), t=document.getElementById('org-mode-title'), s=document.getElementById('org-mode-subtitle'); if(banner)banner.classList.toggle('show', mode !== 'personal'); if(t)t.textContent=title; if(s)s.textContent=subtitle; document.body.classList.toggle('org-readonly', mode !== 'personal'); }
    async function loadPersonalDashboard(){ const authUser=firebase.auth().currentUser; if(!authUser)return; const dash=await db.collection('dashboards').doc(authUser.uid).get(); initializeDashboard(dash.exists ? dash.data() : null); setOrgMode('personal','My Dashboard','Personal objective view'); showNotification('Personal dashboard loaded.'); }
    async function loadUnitDashboard(){
        const profile=await getCurrentProfile();
        if(!profile || !profile.division || !profile.unit)return showNotification('Please complete your division and unit assignment first.');
        try{
            const snap=await db.collection('users').where('division','==',profile.division).where('unit','==',profile.unit).get();
            const members=[];
            snap.forEach(doc=>members.push(Object.assign({uid:doc.id},doc.data())));
            const combinedRaw=await collectDashboardDocsForUsers(members);
            const combined=aggregateObjectivesByTitle(combinedRaw);
            if(typeof objectivesData !== 'undefined') objectivesData=combined;
            window.objectivesData=combined;
            renderObjectives();
            updateStats();
            decorateOwnerLabels();
            setOrgMode('unit',profile.unit+' Unit Dashboard',members.length+' member(s), '+combined.length+' unique objective(s) after duplicate removal');
            showNotification('Unit dashboard loaded with duplicate objectives merged.');
        }catch(err){
            console.error('Unit dashboard error:',err);
            showNotification('Could not load unit dashboard. Check Firestore permissions for users and dashboards.');
        }
    }
    async function loadDivisionDashboard(){
        const profile=await getCurrentProfile();
        if(!canManageOrg(profile)) return showNotification('Only director-level roles and System Admins can view division-wide dashboards.');
        const isPrimaryAdmin = String(profile.email || '').toLowerCase() === 'admin@nca.gov';
        const division=profile.isAdmin ? (profile.division || '') : profile.division;
        if(!division && !isPrimaryAdmin)return showNotification('Assign yourself to a division first.');
        try{
            const snap=isPrimaryAdmin ? await db.collection('users').get() : await db.collection('users').where('division','==',division).get();
