            const members=[];
            snap.forEach(doc=>members.push(Object.assign({uid:doc.id},doc.data())));
            const combinedRaw=await collectDashboardDocsForUsers(members);
            const combined=aggregateObjectivesByTitle(combinedRaw);
            if(typeof objectivesData !== 'undefined') objectivesData=combined;
            window.objectivesData=combined;
            renderObjectives();
            updateStats();
            decorateOwnerLabels();
            setOrgMode('division',division+' Division Dashboard',members.length+' division member(s), '+combined.length+' unique objective(s) after duplicate removal');
            showNotification('Division dashboard loaded with duplicate objectives merged.');
        }catch(err){
            console.error('Division dashboard error:',err);
            showNotification('Could not load division dashboard. Check Firestore permissions for users and dashboards.');
        }
    }
    function decorateOwnerLabels(){
        const data=(typeof objectivesData !== 'undefined') ? objectivesData : (window.objectivesData || []);
        document.querySelectorAll('.objective-card').forEach(card=>{
            const id=card.getAttribute('data-objective-id');
            const obj=data.find(o=>String(o.id)===String(id));
            const title=card.querySelector('.objective-title');
            if(obj && title && !title.querySelector('.objective-owner-label')){
                const label=obj.ownerSummary || (obj.ownerName ? obj.ownerName : '');
                if(label) title.insertAdjacentHTML('beforeend',' <span class="objective-owner-label"><i class="fas fa-users"></i> '+htmlEscape(label)+(obj.ownerUnit ? ' - '+htmlEscape(obj.ownerUnit) : '')+'</span>');
            }
        });
    }
    async function bootstrapOrgLayer(forcePrompt){ if(!window.firebase || !(window.db || (typeof db !== 'undefined')))return; ensureOrgUI(); try{ const profile=await getCurrentProfile(); const isPrimaryAdmin=profile && String(profile.email || '').toLowerCase()==='admin@nca.gov'; await seedDefaultUnits(); populateDivisionSelect('profile-division-select'); populateDivisionSelect('org-unit-division','RIPS'); populateDivisionSelect('org-assign-division','RIPS'); await refreshOrgLabels(); if(!isPrimaryAdmin) await maybeShowAssignmentGate(forcePrompt); else { const modal=document.getElementById('org-assignment-modal'); if(modal) modal.classList.remove('show'); } }catch(err){ console.error('Organization layer bootstrap error:',err); } }
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',()=>{
        const timer=setInterval(()=>{
            const dashboardVisible=document.getElementById('dashboard-container') && document.getElementById('dashboard-container').style.display !== 'none';
            if(dashboardVisible && window.firebase && firebase.auth().currentUser) bootstrapOrgLayer(false);
        },1200);
        setTimeout(()=>clearInterval(timer),30000);
    });
    window.NCA_ORG_UPGRADE={divisions:NCA_DIVISIONS,defaultUnits:DEFAULT_UNITS_BY_DIVISION,bootstrapOrgLayer,maybeShowAssignmentGate,loadPersonalDashboard,loadUnitDashboard,loadDivisionDashboard,openOrganizationManagement,openProfileAssignmentModal};
})();
</script>








<!-- HARD FIX: Working Register / Change Division & Unit Button -->
<script>
(function(){
  'use strict';

  const HARD_DIVISIONS = [
    'RIPS','Internal Audit','Administration','Legal','Engineering','IT','Cybersecurity','Protocol & Procurement',
    'Consumer','Corporate','Regulatory Administration','Regional Operations','Human Resource','Finance','International Affairs',
    'DG Secretariat','DDG-TO Secretariat','DDG-MO Secretariat'
  ];

  const HARD_DEFAULT_UNITS = {
    'RIPS': ['Innovation','Research','Data and Analytics','Strategy','Policy']
  };

  function hardEsc(value){
    return String(value || '').replace(/[&<>"']/g, function(ch){
      return ({'&':'&amp;','<':'&lt;','>':'&gt;','"':'&quot;',"'":'&#39;'}[ch]);
    });
  }

  function hardDb(){
    try {
      if (window.firebase && firebase.firestore) return firebase.firestore();
    } catch(e) {}
    return null;
  }

  function hardUser(){
    try {
      if (window.firebase && firebase.auth) return firebase.auth().currentUser;
    } catch(e) {}
    return null;
  }

  function hardIsPrimaryAdmin(){
    const user = hardUser();
    if (user && String(user.email || '').toLowerCase() === 'admin@nca.gov') return true;
    try {
      const stored = JSON.parse(sessionStorage.getItem('currentUser') || '{}');
      return String(stored.email || '').toLowerCase() === 'admin@nca.gov';
    } catch(e) { return false; }
  }

  function hardNotify(message){
    try {
      if (typeof showNotification === 'function') {
        showNotification(message);
        return;
      }
    } catch(e) {}
    alert(message);
  }

  function hardGetStoredProfile(){
    try {
      const authUser = hardUser();
      const key = authUser ? ('nca_org_profile_' + authUser.uid) : 'nca_org_profile_guest';
      return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(key) || '{}');
    } catch(e) {
      return {};
    }
  }

  function hardSetStoredProfile(profile){
    try {
      const authUser = hardUser();
      const key = authUser ? ('nca_org_profile_' + authUser.uid) : 'nca_org_profile_guest';
      localStorage.setItem(key, JSON.stringify(profile || {}));
    } catch(e) {}
  }

  function hardCustomUnits(){
    try {
      return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('nca_custom_units_by_division') || '{}');
    } catch(e) {
      return {};
    }
  }

  function hardSaveCustomUnit(division, unit){
    const cleanDivision = String(division || '').trim();
    const cleanUnit = String(unit || '').trim();
    if (!cleanDivision || !cleanUnit) return;
    const all = hardCustomUnits();
    all[cleanDivision] = Array.from(new Set([...(all[cleanDivision] || []), cleanUnit]));
    localStorage.setItem('nca_custom_units_by_division', JSON.stringify(all));
  }

  function hardUnitsForDivision(division){
    const base = HARD_DEFAULT_UNITS[division] || [];
    const extra = hardCustomUnits()[division] || [];
    return Array.from(new Set([...base, ...extra])).sort(function(a,b){ return a.localeCompare(b); });
  }

  function hardEnsureModal(){
    let modal = document.getElementById('nca-hard-org-modal');
    if (modal) return modal;

    const html = `
      <div id="nca-hard-org-modal" style="display:none; position:fixed; inset:0; z-index:999999; background:rgba(0,0,0,0.62); align-items:center; justify-content:center; padding:20px;">
        <div style="width:100%; max-width:680px; background:#fff; color:#1f2937; border-radius:16px; box-shadow:0 24px 80px rgba(0,0,0,0.35); padding:28px; max-height:90vh; overflow:auto;">
          <h2 style="margin:0 0 10px 0; color:#2c3e50; font-size:1.45rem; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:10px;">
            <i class="fas fa-id-card"></i> Register / Change Division & Unit
          </h2>
          <div style="background:#fff8e1; border-left:5px solid #f39c12; padding:12px 14px; border-radius:10px; margin:14px 0 18px 0; font-weight:600;">
            Select your division and unit. Role changes must be assigned by an authorized manager.
          </div>

          <div style="margin-bottom:14px;">
            <label for="nca-hard-division" style="display:block; font-weight:700; margin-bottom:6px;">Division</label>
            <select id="nca-hard-division" style="width:100%; padding:12px; border:1px solid #d1d5db; border-radius:8px; font-size:1rem;"></select>
          </div>

          <div style="margin-bottom:14px;">
            <label for="nca-hard-unit" style="display:block; font-weight:700; margin-bottom:6px;">Unit</label>
            <select id="nca-hard-unit" style="width:100%; padding:12px; border:1px solid #d1d5db; border-radius:8px; font-size:1rem;"></select>
            <small style="display:block; margin-top:5px; color:#64748b;">If your unit is not listed, type it below.</small>
          </div>

          <div style="margin-bottom:14px;">
            <label for="nca-hard-new-unit" style="display:block; font-weight:700; margin-bottom:6px;">Create / Request New Unit</label>
            <input id="nca-hard-new-unit" type="text" placeholder="Example: Monitoring Unit" style="width:100%; padding:12px; border:1px solid #d1d5db; border-radius:8px; font-size:1rem;">
          </div>

          <div style="margin-bottom:14px;">
            <label for="nca-hard-role" style="display:block; font-weight:700; margin-bottom:6px;">Role</label>
            <select id="nca-hard-role" disabled style="width:100%; padding:12px; border:1px solid #d1d5db; border-radius:8px; font-size:1rem;">
              <option value="employee">Employee</option>
            </select>
          </div>

          <div style="display:flex; justify-content:flex-end; gap:12px; flex-wrap:wrap; margin-top:22px;">
            <button type="button" id="nca-hard-cancel" style="padding:11px 18px; border:none; border-radius:8px; background:#e5e7eb; color:#111827; font-weight:700; cursor:pointer;">Cancel</button>
            <button type="button" id="nca-hard-save" style="padding:11px 18px; border:none; border-radius:8px; background:#3498db; color:#fff; font-weight:700; cursor:pointer;">Save Division & Unit</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>`;
    document.body.insertAdjacentHTML('beforeend', html);
    modal = document.getElementById('nca-hard-org-modal');

    document.getElementById('nca-hard-cancel').onclick = function(){ hardCloseModal(); };
    document.getElementById('nca-hard-save').onclick = function(){ hardSaveProfile(); };
    document.getElementById('nca-hard-division').onchange = function(){ hardPopulateUnits(this.value, ''); };
    modal.addEventListener('click', function(e){
      if (e.target === modal) hardCloseModal();
    });

    return modal;
  }

  function hardPopulateDivisions(selected){
    const sel = document.getElementById('nca-hard-division');
    if (!sel) return;
    sel.innerHTML = '<option value="">Select division</option>' + HARD_DIVISIONS.map(function(d){
      return '<option value="'+hardEsc(d)+'" '+(d === selected ? 'selected' : '')+'>'+hardEsc(d)+'</option>';
    }).join('');
  }

  function hardPopulateUnits(division, selected){
    const sel = document.getElementById('nca-hard-unit');
    if (!sel) return;
    const units = hardUnitsForDivision(division);
    if (!division) {
      sel.innerHTML = '<option value="">Select division first</option>';
      return;
    }
    if (!units.length) {
      sel.innerHTML = '<option value="">No unit listed yet - type new unit below</option>';
      return;
    }
    sel.innerHTML = '<option value="">Select unit</option>' + units.map(function(u){
      return '<option value="'+hardEsc(u)+'" '+(u === selected ? 'selected' : '')+'>'+hardEsc(u)+'</option>';
    }).join('');
  }

  async function hardLoadProfile(){
    const local = hardGetStoredProfile();
    const authUser = hardUser();
    const db = hardDb();
    if (authUser && db) {
      try {
        const snap = await db.collection('users').doc(authUser.uid).get();
        if (snap.exists) {
          return Object.assign({}, local, snap.data() || {});
        }
      } catch(e) {
        console.warn('Could not read user profile from Firestore:', e);
      }
    }
    return local || {};
  }

  async function hardOpenModal(event){
    if (hardIsPrimaryAdmin()) {
      hardNotify('Admin account has organization-wide access and does not need division/unit assignment.');
      return false;
    }
    if (event) {
      event.preventDefault();
      event.stopPropagation();
      if (event.stopImmediatePropagation) event.stopImmediatePropagation();
    }

    const modal = hardEnsureModal();
    const profile = await hardLoadProfile();
    const division = profile.division || profile.divisionId || '';
    const unit = profile.unit || profile.unitId || '';
    const role = 'employee';

    hardPopulateDivisions(division);
    hardPopulateUnits(division || 'RIPS', unit);
    const roleEl = document.getElementById('nca-hard-role');
    const newUnitEl = document.getElementById('nca-hard-new-unit');
    if (roleEl) roleEl.value = role;
    if (newUnitEl) newUnitEl.value = '';

    modal.style.display = 'flex';
    setTimeout(function(){
      const divSel = document.getElementById('nca-hard-division');
      if (divSel) divSel.focus();
    }, 50);

    return false;
  }

  function hardCloseModal(){
    const modal = document.getElementById('nca-hard-org-modal');
    if (modal) modal.style.display = 'none';
  }

  function hardUpdateLabels(profile){
    const isPrimaryAdmin = hardIsPrimaryAdmin() || String((profile && profile.email) || '').toLowerCase() === 'admin@nca.gov';
    const division = isPrimaryAdmin ? 'All Divisions' : (profile.division || 'Unassigned');
    const unit = isPrimaryAdmin ? 'All Units' : (profile.unit || 'Unassigned');
    const roleText = ({employee:'Employee', unitLead:'Unit Lead', divisionalHead:'Divisional Head', director:'Director', secretariat:'Secretariat', deputyDirectorGeneral:'Deputy Director General', systemAdmin:'System Administrator'}[profile.role] || profile.role || 'Employee');

    const divisionLabel = document.getElementById('divisionLabel') || document.getElementById('org-division-label');
    const unitLabel = document.getElementById('unitLabel') || document.getElementById('org-unit-label');
    const roleLabel = document.getElementById('roleLabel') || document.getElementById('org-role-label');

    if (divisionLabel) divisionLabel.innerHTML = '<i class="fas fa-building"></i> Division: ' + hardEsc(division);
    if (unitLabel) unitLabel.innerHTML = '<i class="fas fa-users"></i> Unit: ' + hardEsc(unit);
    if (roleLabel) roleLabel.innerHTML = '<i class="fas fa-user-shield"></i> Role: ' + hardEsc(roleText);

    // Also update any badges by visible text if the above ids differ.
    Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.org-meta-badge')).forEach(function(el){
      const txt = (el.textContent || '').toLowerCase();
      if (txt.includes('division')) el.innerHTML = '<i class="fas fa-building"></i> Division: ' + hardEsc(division);
      if (txt.includes('unit')) el.innerHTML = '<i class="fas fa-users"></i> Unit: ' + hardEsc(unit);
      if (txt.includes('role')) el.innerHTML = '<i class="fas fa-user-shield"></i> Role: ' + hardEsc(roleText);
    });
  }

  async function hardSaveProfile(){
    const division = (document.getElementById('nca-hard-division') || {}).value || '';
    let unit = (document.getElementById('nca-hard-unit') || {}).value || '';
    const newUnit = ((document.getElementById('nca-hard-new-unit') || {}).value || '').trim();
    const role = 'employee';

    if (!division) {
      hardNotify('Please select your division.');
      return;
    }

    if (newUnit) {
      unit = newUnit;
      hardSaveCustomUnit(division, unit);
    }

    if (!unit) {
      hardNotify('Please select or create your unit.');
      return;
    }

    const profile = {
      division: division,
      divisionId: division,
      unit: unit,
      unitId: unit,
      role: role,
      profileCompleted: true,
      orgUpdatedAt: new Date().toISOString()
    };

    hardSetStoredProfile(profile);
    hardUpdateLabels(profile);

    const authUser = hardUser();
    const db = hardDb();

    if (authUser && db) {
      try {
        await db.collection('users').doc(authUser.uid).set(Object.assign({
          email: authUser.email || '',
          uid: authUser.uid
        }, profile), { merge: true });

        await db.collection('units').doc(division.replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9]/g,'_') + '_' + unit.replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9]/g,'_')).set({
          id: division + '|' + unit,
          name: unit,
          unit: unit,
          division: division,
          divisionId: division,
          active: true,
          updatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
          createdBy: authUser.uid
        }, { merge: true });
      } catch(e) {
        console.error('Firestore save failed:', e);
        hardNotify('Saved locally, but Firestore rejected the save. Check your Firestore rules.');
        hardCloseModal();
        return;
      }
    }

    hardCloseModal();
    hardNotify('Division and unit saved successfully.');
  }

  function hardRemoveDuplicateButtons(){
    const matches = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button')).filter(function(btn){
      return (btn.textContent || '').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim().toLowerCase().includes('register / change division');
    });
    matches.forEach(function(btn){
      if (btn.id !== 'nca-hard-register-btn') btn.remove();
    });
  }

  function hardEnsureButton(){
    hardRemoveDuplicateButtons();

    if (hardIsPrimaryAdmin()) {
      const existing = document.getElementById('nca-hard-register-btn');
      if (existing) existing.style.display = 'none';
      return existing;
    }

    let btn = document.getElementById('nca-hard-register-btn');
    if (!btn) {
      btn = document.createElement('button');
      btn.type = 'button';
      btn.id = 'nca-hard-register-btn';
      btn.className = 'action-btn';
      btn.innerHTML = '<i class="fas fa-id-card"></i> Register / Change Division & Unit';

      const controls = document.querySelector('.view-controls') || document.querySelector('.controls');
      if (controls) {
        const unitBtn = document.getElementById('unitDashboardBtn');
        if (unitBtn && unitBtn.parentElement === controls) controls.insertBefore(btn, unitBtn);
        else controls.insertBefore(btn, controls.firstChild);
      }
    }

    btn.setAttribute('onclick', 'return window.NCA_openDivisionUnitRegistration(event);');
    btn.onclick = hardOpenModal;
    btn.onpointerdown = function(e){ e.stopPropagation(); };
    return btn;
  }

  function hardEnsureLabelsExist(){
    // Duplicate badge prevention: the original org-meta-panel already creates
    // the Division / Unit / Role badges, so this fallback must not add a
    // second row. It only removes the fallback row if an older cached version
    // created it.
    const duplicatePanel = document.getElementById('nca-hard-org-meta-panel');
    if (duplicatePanel) duplicatePanel.remove();
  }

  async function hardRefreshLabels(){
    hardEnsureLabelsExist();
    const profile = await hardLoadProfile();
    hardUpdateLabels(profile || {});
  }

  function hardBoot(){
    window.NCA_openDivisionUnitRegistration = hardOpenModal;
    window.NCA_saveDivisionUnitRegistration = hardSaveProfile;

    hardEnsureModal();
    hardEnsureLabelsExist();
    hardEnsureButton();
    hardRefreshLabels();

    document.addEventListener('click', function(e){
      const target = e.target && e.target.closest ? e.target.closest('#nca-hard-register-btn') : null;
      if (target) return hardOpenModal(e);
    }, true);
  }

  if (document.readyState === 'loading') document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', hardBoot);
  else hardBoot();

  let hardAttempts = 0;
  const hardInterval = setInterval(function(){
    hardAttempts++;
    hardEnsureLabelsExist();
    hardEnsureButton();
    hardRefreshLabels();
    if (hardAttempts > 90) clearInterval(hardInterval);
  }, 1000);
})();
</script>


<!-- ===== Hierarchy Upgrade Patch Inserted ===== -->
<script>
const ROLE_TYPES = {
  ADMIN: 'admin',
  DIRECTOR: 'director',
  SECRETARIAT: 'secretariat',
  DEPUTY_DIRECTOR_GENERAL: 'deputyDirectorGeneral',
  DEPUTY_DIRECTOR: 'deputy_director',
  UNIT_HEAD: 'unit_head',
  UNIT_MEMBER: 'unit_member'
};

async function loadUserHierarchy(userId) {
  const userDoc = await db.collection('users').doc(userId).get();
  if (!userDoc.exists) return null;
  const userData = userDoc.data();
  return {
    uid: userId,
    role: userData.role || 'unit_member',
    divisionId: userData.divisionId || null,
    divisionName: userData.divisionName || null,
    unitId: userData.unitId || null,
    unitName: userData.unitName || null,
    deputyDirectorId: userData.deputyDirectorId || null,
    supervisedUnits: userData.supervisedUnits || []
  };
}

function resolveVisibilityScope(hierarchy, divisionDeputyCount = 1) {
  switch(hierarchy.role) {
    case ROLE_TYPES.ADMIN:
      return { mode: 'organization', scope: 'all' };
    case ROLE_TYPES.DIRECTOR:
    case ROLE_TYPES.SECRETARIAT:
    case ROLE_TYPES.DEPUTY_DIRECTOR_GENERAL:
      return { mode: 'division', scope: hierarchy.divisionId };
    case ROLE_TYPES.DEPUTY_DIRECTOR:
      return divisionDeputyCount <= 1
        ? { mode: 'division', scope: hierarchy.divisionId }
        : { mode: 'deputy', scope: hierarchy.supervisedUnits };
    case ROLE_TYPES.UNIT_HEAD:
    case ROLE_TYPES.UNIT_MEMBER:
      return { mode: 'unit', scope: hierarchy.unitId };
    default:
      return { mode: 'personal', scope: hierarchy.uid };
  }
}
</script>
<!-- ===== End Hierarchy Upgrade Patch ===== -->





<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
    const roleSelect = document.getElementById('role-select');
    const unitContainer = document.getElementById('unit-selection-container');

    function updateUnitVisibility() {
        if (!roleSelect || !unitContainer) return;
        const role = (roleSelect.value || '').toLowerCase();

        if (role === 'admin' || role === 'director' || role === 'secretariat' || role === 'deputydirectorgeneral') {
            unitContainer.style.display = 'none';
        } else {
            unitContainer.style.display = '';
        }
    }

    if (roleSelect) {
        roleSelect.addEventListener('change', updateUnitVisibility);
        updateUnitVisibility();
    }
});
</script>

















<script>
(function () {
    function stripOldDisplayPrefixes(title) {
        let cleaned = String(title || '').trim();

        // Remove old generic unit prefix e.g. "unit-obj-1."
        cleaned = cleaned.replace(/^\s*unit-obj-\d+\.\s*/i, '');

        // Remove previous unit-aware prefix e.g. "Innovation Unit-Obj-1."
        cleaned = cleaned.replace(/^\s*[^.]{1,100}\s+Unit-Obj-\d+\.\s*/i, '');

        // Remove external list numbering e.g. "1. Objective 1:"
        cleaned = cleaned.replace(/^\s*\d+\.\s*/i, '');

        return cleaned.trim();
    }

    function removeObjectiveLabel(title) {
        let cleaned = String(title || '').trim();

        // Remove duplicate legacy prefixes before formatting
        cleaned = cleaned.replace(/^\s*unit-obj-\d+\.\s*/i, '');
        cleaned = cleaned.replace(/^\s*[^.]{1,100}\s+Unit-Obj-\d+\.\s*/i, '');
        cleaned = cleaned.replace(/^\s*Objective\s+\d+\s*:\s*/i, '');

        return cleaned.trim();
    }

    function getObjectiveNumber(objective) {
        const candidates = [
            objective && objective.objectiveNumber,
            objective && objective.objNumber,
            objective && objective.number,
            objective && objective.displayIndex,
            objective && objective.renderIndex,
            objective && objective.id
        ];

        for (const value of candidates) {
            if (value === null || value === undefined || value === '') continue;

            const text = String(value).trim();

            // Handles numeric IDs and IDs like "unit-obj-1"
            const match = text.match(/(\d+)$/);
            if (match) return parseInt(match[1], 10);
        }

        return 1;
    }

    function resolveUnitName(objective) {
        const candidates = [
            objective && objective.unitName,
            objective && objective.unit,
            objective && objective.ownerUnitName,
            objective && objective.ownerUnit,
            objective && objective.unitLabel,
            window.currentUser && window.currentUser.unitName,
            window.currentUser && window.currentUser.unit,
            window.currentUserData && window.currentUserData.unitName,
            window.currentUserData && window.currentUserData.unit
        ];

        for (const value of candidates) {
            if (value && String(value).trim() && !String(value).toLowerCase().includes('unknown')) {
                return String(value).replace(/\s+Unit$/i, '').trim();
            }
        }

        return 'Unknown';
    }

    function getDashboardMode() {
        return String(
            window.currentDashboardMode ||
            window.dashboardMode ||
            window.activeDashboardMode ||
            'personal'
        ).toLowerCase();
    }

    window.getObjectiveDisplayTitle = function (objective) {
        const mode = getDashboardMode();
        const number = getObjectiveNumber(objective);
        const cleaned = stripOldDisplayPrefixes(objective && objective.title);
        const aggregatedModes = ['unit', 'division', 'deputy', 'organization', 'admin'];

        if (aggregatedModes.includes(mode)) {
            const unitName = resolveUnitName(objective);
            const titleWithoutObjectiveLabel = removeObjectiveLabel(cleaned);
            return `${unitName} Unit-Obj-${number}. ${titleWithoutObjectiveLabel}`;
        }

        // My Dashboard format: Objective 1: ...
        if (/^Objective\s+\d+\s*:/i.test(cleaned)) {
            return cleaned;
        }

        return `Objective ${number}: ${cleaned}`;
    };

    window.getObjectiveEditTitle = function (objective) {
        return stripOldDisplayPrefixes(objective && objective.title);
    };

    // Track dashboard context without changing the dashboard itself.
    document.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
        const target = e.target.closest('button, a, [role="button"]');
        if (!target) return;

        const text = (target.textContent || '').toLowerCase();
        const id = (target.id || '').toLowerCase();

        if (text.includes('my dashboard') || id.includes('mydashboard') || id.includes('personaldashboard')) {
            window.currentDashboardMode = 'personal';
        } else if (text.includes('unit dashboard') || id.includes('unitdashboard')) {
            window.currentDashboardMode = 'unit';
        } else if (text.includes('division') || id.includes('divisiondashboard')) {
            window.currentDashboardMode = 'division';
        } else if (text.includes('deputy') || id.includes('deputydashboard')) {
            window.currentDashboardMode = 'deputy';
        } else if (text.includes('admin') || id.includes('admindashboard')) {
            window.currentDashboardMode = 'admin';
        }
    }, true);

    if (!window.currentDashboardMode) {
        window.currentDashboardMode = 'personal';
    }
})();
</script>

</body>
</html>
